name: Rick Scott
subject: Peter, I know I can trust you, please don’t let me down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=541ce3e1271541c19e7cc180d4cfdeb1&_e=11wy2Or-hpOGS1LgO49CDFGmEFhnPYXU3GA95ug9N1jU8qgq_yYaaxc6khTUaYGVH9d22aDLr37VQ-CqUv5dFdhUA9zYeYK8hYyF_0GJajJO2GyOoGjwkzucqo4J3H-zc8c0nIfDtpHl4cXJETSUxozBgeu_5Kvm5TIw5pUGoxgfs8epWG2fAv7EO8xq3AtTQLgxjAkUL3djMBc7Ph5ISLRadj-E1tk9F1fm9dXgX-YEldkrqXzs5OV-I6bi7eHC89oSEmB9wPOHIp2KXode4ZoZseEq3kgJuiRplzmfI75TgB9ru1mY_y2l98PsLqnitcCfzW3oH06Z-eDu_VKdr9zxsbl_ArP73CQYY8XEOq6E1SqDrw2zxq3pA29Txe5B)
---
Peter, it’s Senator Rick Scott, and I’m writing to you because I know that I can trust you.

**What happens in Florida this November will determine the future of our country.** If we lose here, we have no chance of taking back the White House, winning a Senate Majority, and holding the House.

**And now that the election is coming closer, my opponent is ramping up her attacks against me.** She’s raising millions from Hollywood and woke CEO donors to flood the airwaves and buy voters across the state.

But the truth is, I’m worried that all this money she has may just influence the outcome of this race.

Our fundraising has taken a hit in the past few months, and we have to turn things around if we have a chance of fighting back.

**[Can you contribute what your budget will allow you? Joe Biden’s America has made it hard, but even $5 makes a huge difference.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=541ce3e1271541c19e7cc180d4cfdeb1&_e=11wy2Or-hpOGS1LgO49CDFGmEFhnPYXU3GA95ug9N1jU8qgq_yYaaxc6khTUaYGVH9d22aDLr37VQ-CqUv5dFdhUA9zYeYK8hYyF_0GJajJO2GyOoGjwkzucqo4J3H-zc8c0nIfDtpHl4cXJETSUxozBgeu_5Kvm5TIw5pUGoxgfs8epWG2fAv7EO8xq3AtTQLgxjAkUL3djMBc7Ph5ISEZbVRkDYDkfNvmLhFkUZzYOZl20KJikc2gqrQQ0AaPD0GhN4EY2QZYn3K8G5GShPITNS9cc3s-LdliFRsNH1_T4lzxiAFhWurrUKJoHwSAiEbr3sRnLdClRF_9jPfg3v3TjO2NpFj7R34oTqkoSFPKyr1uaCp7ODnNn0m_W8zRA)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, it’s Senator Rick Scott, and I’m writing to you because I know that I can trust you. What happens in Florida this November will determine the future of our country. If we lose here, we have no chance of taking back the White House, winning a Senate Majority, and holding the House. And now that the election is coming closer, my opponent is ramping up her attacks against me. She’s raising millions from Hollywood and woke CEO donors to flood the airwaves and buy voters across the state. But the truth is, I’m worried that all this money she has may just influence the outcome of this race. Our fundraising has taken a hit in the past few months, and we have to turn things around if we have a chance of fighting back. Thank you, Rick Scott | | | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record-high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. name: Team Hogan
subject: Campaign Catch Up - July 3, 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOGAN FOR MARYLAND, INC
body:
| | | | | [](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=238fe75f41&e=3ef74f1f93)
---
|
---
| Thank you for your interest in Hogan For Maryland!
As we continue our [**Strong Independent Leadership Tour**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=93acbbd8af&e=3ef74f1f93) , our team continues to travel across the state—meeting and talking with Maryland voters about the most important issues they are facing.
**Mark Your Calendar:** In the coming days, Governor Hogan and members of our team will be participating in **four more Fourth of July parades** across the state this week. _Thank you to everyone who joined Governor Hogan and our team in Darlington and Hereford this weekend to kick off celebrating the Fourth of July!_
---
| If you are interested in joining Governor Hogan and Hogan for Maryland in a parade this week, let us know by **signing up**[**here**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=e824c41b1f&e=3ef74f1f93) , and see the below list of times to meet, meeting locations, and staff contact information for each parade in case you have any questions! 🇺🇸
* **Thursday, July 4:** Dundalk Independence Day Parade at 7:15 AM
* Set Up Location: 3411 Dundalk Ave, Dundalk, MD 21222
* Staff POC: Sam Shaver ([sshaver@larryhogan.com](mailto:sshaver@larryhogan.com?subject=null&body=null))

* **Thursday, July 4:** Towson 4th of July Parade at 9:30 AM (_Yumi Hogan will be walking in the parade!_)
* Set Up Location: 290 Towsontown Blvd W, Towson, MD 21204
* Staff POC: Britton Ambrose ([bambrose@larryhogan.com](mailto:bambrose@larryhogan.com?subject=&body=))

* **Thursday, July 4:** Annapolis 4th of July Parade at 5:30 PM
* Set Up Location: Amos Garrett Boulevard
* Staff POC: Meghan Kinner ([mkinner@larryhogan.com](mailto:mkinner@larryhogan.com?subject=&body=))

* **Saturday, July 6:** Havre De Grace 4th of July Parade at 1:00 PM
* Set Up Location: Between Pennington Ave. & Congress Ave.
* Staff POC: Sam Shaver ([sshaver@larryhogan.com](mailto:sshaver@larryhogan.com))

Please **wear your Hogan merch** , and **Hogan for Maryland tee shirts will also be provided on site at each parade.** If you have any questions about this week’s parades, please don't hesitate to reach out!
**Save the Date!:** Governor Hogan will be holding a **Tele Town Hall next Tuesday, July 9th at 6:30 p.m.** to hear directly from Maryland voters. To call in to the Tele Town Hall, dial 855-920-0068. We hope you join Governor Hogan!
---
| **Voter Contact App.** Our voter contact app, **Numinar** , has been set up, and our literature is delivered. Staff have started to go door to door across the state and are contacting voters—but we need more help! If you and people you know would be willing to assist with this critical effort, **sign up for a virtual training**[**HERE**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=ffb719367e&e=3ef74f1f93) or contact your local field staffer.
**Team Roster**
* **Rob Yosaitis** \- Political Director, Rob@larryhogan.com
* **Mari Johnson** \- Coalitions Director, MJohnson@larryhogan.com
* **Tori Laird** \- Election Day Operation Director, vlaird@larryhogan.com
* **Chris Cavey** \- Senior Advisor, ccavey@larryhogan.com
* **Sam Shaver** \- Baltimore/Harford Regional Political Director, sshaver@larryhogan.com
* **Jason Solomon** \- Prince George’s Regional Political Director, jsolomon@larryhogan.com
* **Adam Thompson** \- Western MD Regional Political Director, athompson@larryhogan.com
* **Cody Flerlage** \- Southern MD Regional Political Director, cflerlage@larryhogan.com
* **Jonathan Leiter** \- jleiter@larryhogan.com
* **Andrew Tartakovsky** \- atartakovsky@larryhogan.com
* **Ben Ulery** \- Baltimore County Field Director, bulery@larryhogan.com
* **Britton Ambrose** \- Baltimore City Field Director, bambrose@larryhogan.com
* **Megan Kinner** \- Anne Arundel Field Director, mkinner@larryhogan.com

**Get Involved:** As we roll full steam ahead into the general election, here are more ways to stay involved:
* **Join a coalition.** Our campaign coalition program is fully off the ground, with new coalitions including [“Women for Hogan”](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=0cc6e0292c&e=3ef74f1f93) to [“Small Business Owners for Hogan”](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=eca8c9b0d9&e=3ef74f1f93) to [“Democrats for Hogan”](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=9e1b13a3c8&e=3ef74f1f93) and much, much more! Find the right groups for you and for information on how to join a coalition, visit: [larryhogan.com/coalitions](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=573320fca0&e=3ef74f1f93).

* **Bring a friend.** We are always looking to add more seats to the table here at Hogan for Maryland. Help a friend get involved through our [volunteer portal](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=57aca43292&e=3ef74f1f93) or by joining a coalition too!

* **Share Governor Hogan’s message:** Follow Governor Hogan on [Facebook](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=23510a45cd&e=3ef74f1f93), [Twitter](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=8dbec9784e&e=3ef74f1f93), and [Instagram](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=c6563d8d86&e=3ef74f1f93) and see below for some of the content Governor Hogan has put out on the airwaves lately, and don’t forget to amplify!

---
[](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=f4fe80b175&e=3ef74f1f93)
| **Celebrating Independence Day!** This weekend, Governor Hogan and the Hogan for Maryland team participated in the [**Darlington Independence Day parade**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=e39e6db22f&e=3ef74f1f93) in Harford County and the [**Hereford Independence Day parade**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=41f66596db&e=3ef74f1f93) in Baltimore County!
---
| If you are interested in walking in one or more of the four additional parades this week, **sign up**[**here**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=e36ec2a0a8&e=3ef74f1f93)!
**Affordability Press Conference.** This week as part of our [Strong Independent Leadership Tour](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=061307a4d3&e=3ef74f1f93), Governor Hogan [held a press conference](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=366af85077&e=3ef74f1f93)near the Bay Bridge—where as governor he cut tolls for the first time in 50 years—to announce his [five-point plan](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=02e70eb31b&e=3ef74f1f93) to make life more affordable for Marylanders.
---
[](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=fef4f83b09&e=3ef74f1f93)
| [_Watch Governor Hogan’s remarks here._](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=51f1697ed6&e=3ef74f1f93)
**Celebrating Juneteenth.** Governor Hogan [celebrated](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=a99a93a5c9&e=3ef74f1f93) Juneteenth at the [Annapolis Juneteenth Festival](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=53da15b05c&e=3ef74f1f93), where Governor Hogan met with families and enjoyed the tradition, music, and shopping from local vendors. Governor Hogan is proud to be the first Maryland governor to recognize Juneteenth and sign legislation making it an official state holiday.
---
| _“It was great to attend today’s Juneteenth Festival and join in the celebration with so many families, and all the vendors and volunteers,”_**Governor Hogan said** _. “As Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once said—‘the arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends towards justice.’ Juneteenth reminds us to continue striving for that more perfect union and freedom and justice for all.”_
**Asians for Hogan!** On June 24th, Hogan for Maryland held an [Asians for Hogan event](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=3e65dea1bf&e=3ef74f1f93) in Montgomery County, where Governor Hogan shook hands with voters and delivered remarks to over 500 supporters.
---
| [_View the full album here._](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=5c63be8f64&e=3ef74f1f93)
To learn more about [Asians for Hogan](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=8e68d6ea62&e=3ef74f1f93) or any of Hogan for Maryland’s coalitions, click [here](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=57c729e7d8&e=3ef74f1f93).
**Small Businesses for Hogan.** Governor Hogan was recently endorsed by the [**National Federation of Independent Businesses**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=292535fcd5&e=3ef74f1f93) , the leading organization representing small and independent business owners.
---
[](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=c6166a1bab&e=3ef74f1f93)
| _“As a lifelong small business owner, I understand the steep challenges facing Maryland entrepreneurs, which caused me to run for public office in the first place a decade ago,”_**Governor Hogan said.**_“Small business owners know I have their backs, and I’m so honored they have mine in this fight for Maryland and America’s future.”_
---
[](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=5131673804&e=3ef74f1f93)
| **Discussing Affordability on WBFF.** Earlier today, Governor Hogan [appeared on FOX Baltimore](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=e8090bad2b&e=3ef74f1f93) to discuss affordability and cost-of-living issues in Maryland, including new taxes and fees that went into effect.
---
[](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=a1c5e8e4b4&e=3ef74f1f93)
| [_Watch Governor Hogan’s interview on WBFF._](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=9fae4fc0b6&e=3ef74f1f93)
_“The economy is really tough right now and struggling Maryland families and retirees are paying,”_**Governor Hogan said on WBFF.**_“They’re struggling to try to pay the bills because everything is more expensive—groceries are more expensive, gasoline is more expensive. And now they’re heading down to the beach, it’s gonna cost more for them to take the kids down the boardwalk or buy french fries and go to the amusement park._
**Highlighting Union Endorsements.** A recent [**Washington Examiner article**](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=b02a5759be&e=3ef74f1f93)**** highlighted the support Governor Hogan has received from labor unions in Maryland since his primary win on May 14th.
_“Hogan has a realistic understanding of the state and country he lives in, one that consists not just of the professional class that crowds cities such as Baltimore but one that is rooted in the understanding that two-thirds of eligible voters, such as longshoremen, police, and firefighters, are working-class.”_
---
| _Read the full article_[ _here_](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=1541779407&e=3ef74f1f93) _._
Since the primary, **Governor Hogan has been endorsed by seven unions** —including [International Longshoremen’s Association Local 333](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=8fbddfde10&e=3ef74f1f93), [State Law Enforcement Officers Labor Alliance](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=7730178e56&e=3ef74f1f93),[ International Union of Police Associations](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=02f2bf89d2&e=3ef74f1f93), [Ocean City Career Firefighter Paramedics Association IAFF Local 4269](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=b43cc747e3&e=3ef74f1f93), [Worcester County Professional Firefighters IAFF Local 4916](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=43d0ff6fbf&e=3ef74f1f93), [Marine Engineers’ Beneficial Association](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=ca14615318&e=3ef74f1f93), and [International Longshoremen’s Association Local 1429](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=8cde632064&e=3ef74f1f93).
We are beyond grateful for your enthusiastic support for our campaign, and look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail.
To stay up to date on all of Governor Hogan’s travels and announcements, follow his social media pages on [Facebook](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=3f318bdf9a&e=3ef74f1f93), [Twitter](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=f7232832bd&e=3ef74f1f93), and [Instagram](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=3bdf4148b7&e=3ef74f1f93) — and don’t forget to amplify!
Talk to you soon!
Rob**Team Hogan**
---
|

---
| | | | [](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=04b86f36a6&e=3ef74f1f93)| [](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=771666cfbe&e=3ef74f1f93)| [](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=4868b98030&e=3ef74f1f93)| [](https://larryhogan.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47050a5a8c0b2955735cf9828&id=d983b4163a&e=3ef74f1f93)

Team Roster Rob Yosaitis \- Political Director, Rob@larryhogan.com Mari Johnson \- Coalitions Director, MJohnson@larryhogan.com Tori Laird \- Election Day Operation Director, vlaird@larryhogan.com Chris Cavey \- Senior Advisor, ccavey@larryhogan.com Sam Shaver \- Baltimore/Harford Regional Political Director, sshaver@larryhogan.com Jason Solomon \- Prince George’s Regional Political Director, jsolomon@larryhogan.com Adam Thompson \- Western MD Regional Political Director, athompson@larryhogan.com Cody Flerlage \- Southern MD Regional Political Director, cflerlage@larryhogan.com Jonathan Leiter \- jleiter@larryhogan.com Andrew Tartakovsky \- atartakovsky@larryhogan.com Ben Ulery \- Baltimore County Field Director, bulery@larryhogan.com Britton Ambrose \- Baltimore City Field Director, bambrose@larryhogan.com Megan Kinner \- Anne Arundel Field Director, mkinner@larryhogan.com Get Involved: As we roll full steam ahead into the general election, here are more ways to stay involved: Join a coalition. Our campaign coalition program is fully off the ground, with new coalitions including to to and much, much more! Find the right groups for you and for information on how to join a coalition, visit: . Bring a friend. We are always looking to add more seats to the table here at Hogan for Maryland. Help a friend get involved through our or by joining a coalition too! Share Governor Hogan’s message: Follow Governor Hogan on , , and and see below for some of the content Governor Hogan has put out on the airwaves lately, and don’t forget to amplify! | Celebrating Independence Day! This weekend, Governor Hogan and the Hogan for Maryland team participated in the in Harford County and the in Baltimore County! | If you are interested in walking in one or more of the four additional parades this week, sign up! Affordability Press Conference. This week as part of our , Governor Hogan the Bay Bridge—where as governor he cut tolls for the first time in 50 years—to announce his to make life more affordable for Marylanders. | Celebrating Juneteenth. Governor Hogan Juneteenth at the , where Governor Hogan met with families and enjoyed the tradition, music, and shopping from local vendors. Governor Hogan is proud to be the first Maryland governor to recognize Juneteenth and sign legislation making it an official state holiday. | “It was great to attend today’s Juneteenth Festival and join in the celebration with so many families, and all the vendors and volunteers,”Governor Hogan said . “As Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once said—‘the arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends towards justice.’ Juneteenth reminds us to continue striving for that more perfect union and freedom and justice for all.” Asians for Hogan! On June 24th, Hogan for Maryland held an in Montgomery County, where Governor Hogan shook hands with voters and delivered remarks to over 500 supporters. | To learn more about or any of Hogan for Maryland’s coalitions, click . Small Businesses for Hogan. Governor Hogan was recently endorsed by the , the leading organization representing small and independent business owners. | “As a lifelong small business owner, I understand the steep challenges facing Maryland entrepreneurs, which caused me to run for public office in the first place a decade ago,”Governor Hogan said.“Small business owners know I have their backs, and I’m so honored they have mine in this fight for Maryland and America’s future.” | Discussing Affordability on WBFF. Earlier today, Governor Hogan to discuss affordability and cost-of-living issues in Maryland, including new taxes and fees that went into effect. | “The economy is really tough right now and struggling Maryland families and retirees are paying,”Governor Hogan said on WBFF.“They’re struggling to try to pay the bills because everything is more expensive—groceries are more expensive, gasoline is more expensive. And now they’re heading down to the beach, it’s gonna cost more for them to take the kids down the boardwalk or buy french fries and go to the amusement park. Highlighting Union Endorsements. A recent ** highlighted the support Governor Hogan has received from labor unions in Maryland since his primary win on May 14th. “Hogan has a realistic understanding of the state and country he lives in, one that consists not just of the professional class that crowds cities such as Baltimore but one that is rooted in the understanding that two-thirds of eligible voters, such as longshoremen, police, and firefighters, are working-class.” | Read the full article . Since the primary, Governor Hogan has been endorsed by seven unions —including , , , , , and . We are beyond grateful for your enthusiastic support for our campaign, and look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail. To stay up to date on all of Governor Hogan’s travels and announcements, follow his social media pages on , , and — and don’t forget to amplify! Talk to you soon! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Supreme Court just set Trump up to be even more dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Both of these scenarios are within our reach.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2261%2E4032634%2Ekkw0-Z)
---
This week an extremist Supreme Court stacked by Donald Trump has ruled that the President is above the law. Six right-wing justices have given the President free rein to abuse the power of the presidency without constraint. If Donald Trump were President, could he get away with telling the Justice Department to make up dirt to put his political opponents in jail? Could President Trump get away with taking a bribe in exchange for vetoing a law? Could President Trump get away with sending an FBI hit squad to eliminate anyone he decided was a threat? If Trump doesn't get the votes on a bill he wants, can he get away with ordering the military to round up every lawmaker in Congress? And can Trump get away with doing the same to the Supreme Court while he's at it? Donald Trump has already told us how far he’s prepared to go to attack our democracy and rip away our freedoms. He said directly he will be a dictator on Day One of his second administration. And his allies have a plan to replace tens of thousands of federal employees with pre-vetted loyalists at every level of government. That plan is influenced by Project 2025: a 920-page document created by the Heritage Foundation that will guide the Trump Administration on how to carry out an extremist, right-wing transformation of the government in its first 180 days. Project 2025 includes sections on reducing the independence of the Department of Justice, slashing corporate and income taxes and abolishing the Federal Reserve, eliminating terms like “abortion” or “gender equality” from our laws, rolling back protections for the LGBTQ community, and other ways to enact their conservative, anti-abortion, anti-voter, anti-climate, and anti-LGBTQ agenda. And that was all laid out before this week. So this decision from the Supreme Court just set Trump up to be even more dangerous and even less accountable. **So here’s what we can do about this:** In the short-term, we must prevent Donald Trump from returning to the White House and therefore prevent Project 2025 from being enacted. That must be our top priority. Period. And in the long-term, Congress must restore balance by adding more justices to the Court. Congress has already used its constitutional authority to expand the Supreme Court six times in the past. Court expansion isn’t new. It isn’t radical. It’s what we must do to rein in a Court that Republicans packed and that clearly doesn’t feel limited by the rule of law. Congress must also make Supreme Court Justices finally follow a basic and enforceable code of ethics and give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest standards and are free from conflicts of interest. I’ve introduced legislation to do just that. And we need to elect more Senate Democrats in November who understand the stakes of this moment and will vote to end the filibuster. It’s a relic of the Jim Crow-era that is found nowhere in the Constitution and has blocked policies that are so overwhelmingly popular among voters — voters who voted for a Democratic majority — because a minority of Republican senators disagree. This will allow us to pass the policies that the majority of Americans are calling for, like federal abortion rights, voting protections, and gun safety laws. This is all within our reach. But a Trump dictatorship is within reach, too. That’s what is at stake this year. These attacks on our rights, institutions, and democracy are meant to exhaust us. Meant to drain us of our will to fight. But we can’t let them succeed. When we identify the problems we face as a nation, lay out solutions, and go out and fight for them, we can win. I’m throwing everything I’ve got into this fight. That’s my plan from now through November and beyond. And I’m asking you to stay by my side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

subject: Join Us in Taking Back America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
This fight won’t be easy, and we will need to match the Democrat's efforts if we want to take back Ohio and the Senate. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16fce131249f44a4b269faa08043eeb5&_e=_RJBaxc1cdrB8s7WbYL4Z7tjMtO8Z9KKaoFwFhgqkrenbSUuqpUhoOGJt9ORaCWgyki8MzW6GTj5YkPWuVbzjqDwktOhrO-L2e5tiXnBR8AMwQvRAKUdJDMTRvqTtXVOZSGOx8Y4dlHJvJBHUHHtt-i2flzSxoErw_3H8kjcQyndrkqj7Bc53Uz5Gl_niMAON0QLrll3koQ0Lwngn_jDWmHr6rlcjW9bkGxe0z0Sd6BcaWUjtL1qY-82Y-QfEfhXnLhXwB5GpDm8GrOQrCl6C3AO8ADTVtt488pS6FLLT7lw-9MJopUKyTOgqX3SS8B67kS2QUD4bEm-fsKDrtf7WT2u2ffs7uzqrzg48nlq99UXstRv-jWf-RZ1xVL9Yz50enUOCNPYyeDTQhNsoLcI5HBAAbbY9ySp7Jj5Xn3ux5E%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

America is at a crossroads, and the stakes have never been higher. We are blessed to live in the greatest country on earth, but right now, the challenges we face are unprecedented thanks to Joe Biden and radical Democrats. [**That’s why I am reaching out directly to ask for your help in electing Bernie Moreno to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16fce131249f44a4b269faa08043eeb5&_e=_RJBaxc1cdrB8s7WbYL4Z7tjMtO8Z9KKaoFwFhgqkrenbSUuqpUhoOGJt9ORaCWgyki8MzW6GTj5YkPWuVbzjqDwktOhrO-L2e5tiXnBR8AMwQvRAKUdJDMTRvqTtXVOZSGOx8Y4dlHJvJBHUHHtt-i2flzSxoErw_3H8kjcQyndrkqj7Bc53Uz5Gl_niMAON0QLrll3koQ0Lwngn_jDWmHr6rlcjW9bkGxe0z0Sd6BcaWUjtL1qY-82Y-QfEfhX0NV-CFsgwI5JlPLhoaJLaVbok7eXzVNOlfzu_cYsQkrxYMWVC2KKci9QO_cFQ25sgwmwK1zLcgFO1ayuRN3ECrEwjSRI1VwN92f7Mf-Sm-leqhXS5bLMwQ8_UeX1E2fFJItWfu7s10Q3UDFSVMKFsAhiQCf2-TjvaRAhiBy3TmI%3D)

**Open borders. Sky-high inflation. Radical policies.**

These are the hallmarks of the current Democratic leadership, and it’s clear that we cannot afford another term of their failed policies. _But we have an opportunity to change the course of our nation._

Bernie Moreno is running for Senate in Ohio, and his race is critical to the success of the America First agenda. It’s our chance to take back the Senate from the Democrats. [**But to do it, we need your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16fce131249f44a4b269faa08043eeb5&_e=_RJBaxc1cdrB8s7WbYL4Z7tjMtO8Z9KKaoFwFhgqkrenbSUuqpUhoOGJt9ORaCWgyki8MzW6GTj5YkPWuVbzjqDwktOhrO-L2e5tiXnBR8AMwQvRAKUdJDMTRvqTtXVOZSGOx8Y4dlHJvJBHUHHtt-i2flzSxoErw_3H8kjcQyndrkqj7Bc53Uz5Gl_niMAON0QLrll3koQ0Lwngn_jDWmHr6rlcjW9bkGxe0z0Sd6BcaWUjtL1qY-82Y-QfEfhXNh9nS2fChuSU74QpIU3zR3BMGmcpeTRoTz74Oi1CmywqSV3TIcv1WIQJKo41BidxAc9JbNUSViZC122AOnrYxSuAw08DathTp69h2osCABjHB6ZIYOX1oDMMFsNi6njKkWAO8Fgp-PdmrR-2wuX5YJaQBQZcmeCvLlJe5OVT0Nc%3D)

[ **FLIP THE SENATE ➝
ELECT BERNIE MORENO ➝** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16fce131249f44a4b269faa08043eeb5&_e=_RJBaxc1cdrB8s7WbYL4Z7tjMtO8Z9KKaoFwFhgqkrenbSUuqpUhoOGJt9ORaCWgyki8MzW6GTj5YkPWuVbzjqDwktOhrO-L2e5tiXnBR8AMwQvRAKUdJDMTRvqTtXVOZSGOx8Y4dlHJvJBHUHHtt-i2flzSxoErw_3H8kjcQyndrkqj7Bc53Uz5Gl_niMAON0QLrll3koQ0Lwngn_jDWmHr6rlcjW9bkGxe0z0Sd6BcaWUjtL1qY-82Y-QfEfhXGU0TNMEV5fCaDnnr1zozdo05pIu214sgZQaYLLElLI1ebzdpIjRQfRLuILpS4F6X0YjIUTeDsr9jxjI-EpkrydZbD0cHLkEKEClBjeEuuAKNAY55UT6tKe96spf6dEbWuMxLZ1_sGQiD1ew8BySTA-PBohCOgeJULCap0RAklzQ%3D)
**Sherrod Brown, Bernie’s opponent, is spending over $100 million and counting to keep his seat and continue pushing his destructive policies.** The spending in this race is astronomical and historic, and it shows just how desperate the Democrats are to hold onto power.

But we have something they don’t: **faith, determination, and an unyielding belief in the American Dream.**

This fight won’t be easy, and we will need to match the Democrats' efforts if we want to take back Ohio and the Senate. [**So please, fellow patriot, I am asking you to chip in just $5 or whatever you can to elect my friend Bernie and send a resounding message to the radical left this fall!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=16fce131249f44a4b269faa08043eeb5&_e=_RJBaxc1cdrB8s7WbYL4Z7tjMtO8Z9KKaoFwFhgqkrenbSUuqpUhoOGJt9ORaCWgyki8MzW6GTj5YkPWuVbzjqDwktOhrO-L2e5tiXnBR8AMwQvRAKUdJDMTRvqTtXVOZSGOx8Y4dlHJvJBHUHHtt-i2flzSxoErw_3H8kjcQyndrkqj7Bc53Uz5Gl_niMAON0QLrll3koQ0Lwngn_jDWmHr6rlcjW9bkGxe0z0Sd6BcaWUjtL1qY-82Y-QfEfhX0HtKSiHaiJ3kwCv9mdJNgF_105YmDYnfmZME647_KlGSZ1jm8e9d78_IXRpqQWTBx9GIbkbqjsvNL9lmXhWwFwwWEE1OXWrDy4LmT4dvRvgt0j8Df5YngU6rUcDViVbnSmtn5luDdsLHv2T-o17PwkiX-2pAigGp075MI2Wjmc0%3D)

This is a battle for the soul of our nation, and I hope you’ll join us.

**Senator Tim Scott**

But we have an opportunity to change the course of our nation. Bernie Moreno is running for Senate in Ohio, and his race is critical to the success of the America First agenda. It’s our chance to take back the Senate from the Democrats. Sherrod Brown, Bernie’s opponent, is spending over $100 million and counting to keep his seat and continue pushing his destructive policies. The spending in this race is astronomical and historic, and it shows just how desperate the Democrats are to hold onto power. But we have something they don’t: faith, determination, and an unyielding belief in the American Dream. name: David Hogg
subject: Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Happy Independence Day from all of us at Leaders We Deserve.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240703-1&t=1&akid=890%2E587540%2EeRr6CC)
Peter,
With the Fourth of July tomorrow, I thought I’d share what the day means to me.
America was founded on the idea of freedom. Have we lived up to that promise?
**No – _from the start_ , we’ve battled with inequality, racism, and exclusionary policies that secured freedom for some while leaving others out of the equation entirely.**
But just like today, some of those who came before us did not accept that our country could never reach its professed ideals. We’ve made progress in many areas, including expanding voting and civil rights, guaranteeing reproductive freedom and the right to privacy, securing marriage equality and other protections for the LGBTQ+ community, and more.
That’s why _all_ of us are in this fight: We’ve seen progress in action throughout our history. We know it’s not impossible to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice, like Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once described. **We can fight for – and win – a better future for everyone.**
Today, Donald Trump and his MAGA cult are hellbent on _rolling back_ Americans’ freedoms, not expanding them.
The far-right Supreme Court reversed _Roe v. Wade_ , and multiple red states have since banned and criminalized abortion.
Conservatives are pushing proposals that restrict freedom and equality for the LGBTQ+ community, especially trans folks.
Republicans in states like Texas and Florida are attacking the right to public education, while others are inserting their Christian religion into the curriculum.
And on top of everything, the GOP’s fearless leader, through his words and actions, has accelerated our democracy’s decline.
Republicans love to carry the mantle of patriotism, but for a group that claims to love America so much, they seem to have very little interest in freedom for all. In my mind, that’s what the Fourth of July – _and the whole idea of America_ – is all about.
**Freedom is foundational.** I believe that our generation can continue the fight for this basic tenet of the “American Dream,” but first we have to defeat the party who is so clearly invested in erasing freedom for large swaths of America.
**[This Fourth of July, can you make a $5 contribution to support our work electing the next generation of progressive leaders to fight for our freedoms?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240703-1?refcode=em20240703-1&amount=5&refcode2=890_587540_eRr6CC&akid=890%2E587540%2EeRr6CC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240703-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240703-1-890&refcode2=890_587540_eRr6CC&akid=890%2E587540%2EeRr6CC)**
**Peter, Happy Independence Day from me and all of us at Leaders We Deserve!**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240703-1&t=2&refcode2=890_587540_eRr6CC&akid=890%2E587540%2EeRr6CC)**

body:
Confirm your Democratic Supporter Membership:
| Hi friend, I wanted to personally reach out because I am BLOWN AWAY by the surge of Democratic Supporter Membership sign-ups we got in June!

**It’s clear: Democrats are fired up.**

But with a holiday weekend coming up, we’re expecting a significant slump in momentum — **_a slump we can’t afford to hit this close to the election._**

If 1,000 more Democrats confirm their memberships by 11:59 pm, we’ll be in a great spot to keep Democrats like President Biden surging.

So I really need to see YOUR name on our supporter list. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump threatened to jail me and the Supreme Court granted him legal immunity to do so.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6935%2E5257348%2EPPi8jG ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald
Trump threatened to jail me Sunday.

The Supreme Court majority that he installed gave him almost absolute
legal immunity to do so if he wins in November.

And he didn’t just threaten to jail me,
Derek:

He threatened to jail the president and vice president.
Members of the January 6 Committee.
Leader Schumer and Speaker Pelosi.
Mitch McConnell and Mike Pence.

Anyone who could potentially stand in the way of his quest for total,
unquestionable power.

Derek, I am
usually an optimist. But it’s hard to be optimistic with a Supreme Court
decision this extreme, to excuse a former president this dangerous.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2024_abs_em.oAIbuh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240703_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1004&akid=6935%2E5257348%2EPPi8jG ]We need to stop Trump at the ballot box and elect Democrats over the
MAGA enablers Trump has elevated to the top of the Republican Party. Our
democracy depends on it. Rush a
$5
donation to help me respond to Trump’s threat.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=july2024_abs_em.XD-pOq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240703_PM3_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1005&akid=6935%2E5257348%2EPPi8jG ]EXPRESS DONATE

$50

We cannot let Trump’s extreme threats go unanswered.

I still believe that the overwhelming majority of the American people will
not stand for a president who got permission from this partisan Supreme

November.

Our democracy depends on it.

— Adam

# _Did you watch the DEBATE?_
---
[](https://hernandezforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=314f047675baff18221b82bdc&id=b6a34c0a5d&e=638e6c2751)
| _**Even CNN pundits were depressed by Biden’s performance. Mainstream News reluctantly reports that there is a good opportunity for a Republican to soon occupy the White House.**_
_**For things to change in our country under new leadership, Congress needs to work with the President to swiftly pass legislation to:**_

* _**Restore energy independence & lower taxes, to spark economic growth & drive down inflation.**_

* _**Shutdown the border to ensure American jobs for American workers.**_

* _**And finally, with the latest Supreme Court decisions & Biden going after his political enemies, it’s time to reign in out of control government!**_

---
|
## _Blocking swift action will come from Democrats like my opponent, a 77-year-old woman who has been in Congress for 30 years. Being in Congress is an enriching experience...she has over $2million to spend on her campaign alone._

## _With your help, “WE THE PEOPLE” can take back control of our County. Joe Biden has given us Democrat voters to look our way!_
---
| _**Let’s get Peter’s message out! We need 2,000 patriots to donate $25 or $50 Today!**_

name: Wes Moore
subject: President Biden is the partner I need
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88204217/483491105/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQ0NjU5ZC1hMzM5LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k80k2UIuGgSTjlUcognvSqI1EZ1KqmJ-QkknXuFe1_c=&emci=2871e939-a139-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=1544659d-a339-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24635485)
Friend, President Biden is the partner I need in the White House, now and for the next four years. We could not have delivered such enormous progress for Marylanders without his and Vice President Harris’ leadership and support. Together, we’ve created nearly 40,000 jobs, made historic investments in education, brought broadband across the state, and seen the most significant drop in crime in a generation. Our state is back on track with the help of President Biden. When I was in the Army, I learned that it’s easy to stand by people when things are going well, but you learn about the mettle of a person when times are hard. I know Joe Biden’s resolve because I saw it first-hand when he stood by the people of Maryland every step of the way as we re-opened the Port of Baltimore faster than anyone thought possible following the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge. The contrast between candidates could not be more clear in this election. President Biden believes in Maryland’s promise. Donald Trump thinks Baltimore, my state’s largest city, is “a disgusting, rat and rodent infested mess.” Those are the stakes. I know President Biden has Maryland’s back, so I’ve got his. Elevate, Wes | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88204218/483491106/-70909738?refcode=em20240703-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTQ0NjU5ZC1hMzM5LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k80k2UIuGgSTjlUcognvSqI1EZ1KqmJ-QkknXuFe1_c=)**

body:
This fight won’t be easy, and we will need to match the Democrat's efforts if we want to take back Ohio and the Senate. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpR0PlBuSX02XnLctEvRM1FH4VhtuFoVUh0BvZLB8yvP0wo6KqBpQr3a_JhcJn-ZWhR8HnYFC8EC8Ac3e22NY4Cp8n6oHyLma0MvFfF3C_7mwKdg93bhqsCrurXK0yTAhwi00x-GDDiDiwKy5idzUmyj5_vy9TS_HxL2f8qcwX-Xjw%3D)

Fellow patriot,

America is at a crossroads, and the stakes have never been higher. We are blessed to live in the greatest country on earth, but right now, the challenges we face are unprecedented thanks to Joe Biden and radical Democrats. [**That’s why I am reaching out directly to ask for your help in electing Bernie Moreno to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpRsGRY88v3AlaN0iw0Bfa3rAfLsa6aOpbm-8TxxeGrnE9Dc7SsUCo5a75TtAGWFyfi1-4wIAC81VFPq3rDswnIUnEC0L8sxTplWgOS9hjs2S7PEu-rDAqeBrJpXoxjNuFBvBBDo5tWXaysI_iSk1h_1RRPfa8AKQ6PZSoXzRfuKSY%3D)

**Open borders. Sky-high inflation. Radical policies.**

These are the hallmarks of the current Democratic leadership, and it’s clear that we cannot afford another term of their failed policies. _But we have an opportunity to change the course of our nation._

Bernie Moreno is running for Senate in Ohio, and his race is critical to the success of the America First agenda. It’s our chance to take back the Senate from the Democrats. [**But to do it, we need your help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpRUrRZlLv1M_lRhB2uA6V-I0q1Djm-fxWcI8Z9WrgyEn6_2JNKV4QfBkGVLgiUxzL2pj4Ax8N6LubqrVSeI2Bk7VEsTHgUrS12r3vGynqOD5QktIAseSQ7lo3e6FzZ_8Ml1eK7uRoMnAZDXG9DC7gNmzOhHRJijBAYYimGGljxBgo%3D)

[ **FLIP THE SENATE ➝
ELECT BERNIE MORENO ➝** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpRgF4a_avjV_IKpRqZup6rzLtjnnr3T8-CwafX_gWe3HXNmElbgwJ5Ve1l9lgNde44C1uRwxzjQQP1MTF2quW85py4e5DAUlr1VOHjvcE2vSdA37T9C1aZnVGMG2G9j32G3qzoj-IuK6lYllasrxEQkyb1eOix69tBySbay-TsLQ0%3D)
**Sherrod Brown, Bernie’s opponent, is spending over $100 million and counting to keep his seat and continue pushing his destructive policies.** The spending in this race is astronomical and historic, and it shows just how desperate the Democrats are to hold onto power.

But we have something they don’t: **faith, determination, and an unyielding belief in the American Dream.**

This fight won’t be easy, and we will need to match the Democrats' efforts if we want to take back Ohio and the Senate. [**So please, fellow patriot, I am asking you to chip in just $5 or whatever you can to elect my friend Bernie and send a resounding message to the radical left this fall!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpRdWJSY_yKBTgY3BgBzVgl6_6JrX10kXlEzoUly_WwQpOeJoUxY7n6yLyB7qMKW6DgCUkdSlLmGHRcQCpeC9RIVRp--p1_GtW-YHmzWK_Pm0mmbGaIoPJ-c537rbxUG6yxUncF_V9VIPt_sQQphMk0ux5R2W8W1zBXq-SG3eDj5Wg%3D)

This is a battle for the soul of our nation, and I hope you’ll join us.

God bless,

**Senator Tim Scott**

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpRxaKTTLuiS4neBuc78Fq_16dNv2UMZwtUmDvO8Nrqwn7p9U1nUNQM6TYxA_GS7TdiISMk5Onk-_tHhagrLynLMElNHTaA-kS4MNTcHBXORVHboDvAUNEgH9uaDRxjTUCZ-vkt7EKNfce78VkxpZumGZXcTDWXkmbB1WwrkVR4J8A%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d7ee299c9d254cb6943cb77b8764b13d&_e=6WkUiSVDEFdWhbZUR5UmxcXQa-y-_DXM4ToEGtfPS70-Rpg1Erswp9NKMk9QFpPLc_30V4S7xBZpZhkHuIRIW2Jpt57tZ-nsmmHfec6l9np0HkFjPxrWSoCQDTFX9ZDlMXU70sx8qFXmeRXZFSJiWe6I0UzlNB6EZ2oMEq1GLhzE6UppUE0sRKI5uvnvp_6swNx_0EFbk3GLXszV3e58HznPOgq2zRvVJwhX3U_nTuAHk6p2bYELPTDVZhGTAVpR3uxy99eW1-BtwXqfxta4XxipsqDAn7Hmvr9cyuDTpf6BnGfL7mHWFcFJgSgpSwWOzuBoytb8ts24EfuFfSV8QC3E-eZ7ujpnr311j2xNrYILye5p0_IBad7ph3fYT736GdQCap7_K8Iq8tRsAWO4qN1A7CM_x3O5U1vfxwiruXM%3D)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Hoping to hear directly from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88204261/483493130/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTc5ODVlMS1hNTM5LWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rr4360uA_CxO_8gT-EdoPgihxNRU1G4NrBywfvsp64=&emci=b3e7a30b-9e39-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2e7985e1-a539-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=252045)
---
Here are just a few of my priorities, folks —
* Lowering everyday costs for working families

* Protecting our communities from gun violence

* Preserving the lands and waters that sustain us

* Defending our democracy

**[Now, I’d like to hear from you directly about your priorities for the month ahead. I thought the GOP was supposed to be all about Conservative Family Values.

| |

---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Unless and until](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=146265702&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2MjY1NzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3MjAwNTgxNDMsImV4cCI6MTcyMjY1MDE0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iuju--JcUVVIuSBYLmXOFg_38tEJWmwp604uWDKnf8o)
### I thought the GOP was supposed to be all about Conservative Family Values.
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jul 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=146265702&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2MjY1NzAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMDA1ODE0MywiZXhwIjoxNzIyNjUwMTQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5K-I2SZT3Q2A0Hv0X06KQTyNmp4ExVOGcG7I9vMnVmA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Katie Johnson v. Donald J. Trump and Jeffrey E. Epstein.
_Case 5:16-cv-00797-DMG-KS Document 1 Filed 04/26/16 Page 3 of 6 Page ID #:3_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/305af754-a965-4ad4-8a47-cc813ae0cc94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The scars of childhood sexual trauma never completely go away. They change. They are, at times, acutely painful, and at other times totally numb. But they are there.
Katie Johnson was 13 years old at the time of the incidents described in her testimony above. Though she dropped her case in light of death threats to her, her family, and her lawyer, it is reasonable to say that she will never fully recover from the trauma.
In the flurry of calls for President Joe Biden to withdraw from the race, the document excerpted above circulated on the internet on numerous social media sites. Was it just released? I'm unclear.
The blaring sirens that should have been squealing on the internet and the cable television outlets as Katie Johnson's testimony bounced from screen to screen were drowned out in the cacophony of voices calling for a new Democratic Presidential nominee.
Donald Trump should have never been the GOP nominee in 2016.
It was a mistake then. It will be a mistake now. How is it even a real thing that Trump is on the ticket? Honestly -- I can't blame Biden for losing it at the podium next to Trump. One thought of the devastation that has happened at Trump's behest and I would have been pale and a little befuddled, too.
The last time Donald Trump was in office, he locked up kids in cages and separated families at the border. He was impeached twice. He has been indicted on some 91 charges and convicted on 34. He created an environment in which Insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol. He called for the hanging of the Vice President. That's just what I can think of off hand. There's more. I'm having a Biden moment when I, too, have gone pale and a little befuddled in simply trying to recall.
Joe Biden is old. He had a rough night. But he never had a night like what Donald Trump forced upon 13-year-old Katie Johnson on at least 4 occasions.
As for the current presidential race: unless and until you can prove to me that he is a liability AND that you have a better candidate, my support remains 100% with Joe Biden.
Unless and until you can prove to me that the GOP can "lock him up" to keep him away from teenage girls, Trump and the Trump surrogates, such as my Republican opponent Elise Stefanik, should be the ones asked to step aside.
You just don't get to loudly, repeatedly, and on your taxpayer-funded House.gov site support the person who perpetuated these crimes on young girls and still call yourself aligned with moral values, supportive of women, and supportive of children. I repeat: Katie Johnson was 13 years old.
Elsie Stefanik did not commit the crimes described above. But she does a tremendous disservice to the country by supporting the man who did. I'm not talking about guilt by association. I am questioning her moral judgment in lending support to the man who could commit such vile acts as described in court filings.
If you don't believe Katie Johnson, fine. We have testimony from many other women throughout Donald Trump's adult life.
Trump's horrific official acts and unofficial acts are in the past. We look to the Heritage Foundation's Project 2025 to learn about how the Trump administration will commit other horrific acts towards the goal of literally dismantling our government. Thanks, SCOTUS, for the pre-game show we saw in your decisions last week.
I thought the GOP was supposed to be about conservative family values. How in the world could Stefanik, as a 40-year-old woman with a small child , offer her 100% Ultra MAGA support to Donald Trump and still claim to protect those GOP conservative family values? And now that she is in lock-step with Trump's agenda, how can she expect us to believe that she has good judgment when it comes to representing the people of NY-21?
It's July the 4th. I should be writing about freedom from chaos and tyranny.
For now, I'm off to the Best 4th in the North Parade in Ticonderoga, mindful of what Heritage Foundation President Kevin Roberts called the "Second American Revolution", which he says could be "bloodless if the left allows it to be."
Maybe I'll see Elise and get to ask her about conservative family values.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Rh68gmVA1C35ZPuKLHZn1q6FF8CEtrj976ayIAqm5Bc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=146265702)
---

The blaring sirens that should have been squealing on the internet and the cable television outlets as Katie Johnson's testimony bounced from screen to screen were drowned out in the cacophony of voices calling for a new Democratic Presidential nominee. Donald Trump should have never been the GOP nominee in 2016. It was a mistake then. It will be a mistake now. How is it even a real thing that Trump is on the ticket? Honestly -- I can't blame Biden for losing it at the podium next to Trump. One thought of the devastation that has happened at Trump's behest and I would have been pale and a little befuddled, too. The last time Donald Trump was in office, he locked up kids in cages and separated families at the border. He was impeached twice. He has been indicted on some 91 charges and convicted on 34. He created an environment in which Insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol. He called for the hanging of the Vice President. That's just what I can think of off hand. There's more. I'm having a Biden moment when I, too, have gone pale and a little befuddled in simply trying to recall. Joe Biden is old. He had a rough night. But he never had a night like what Donald Trump forced upon 13-year-old Katie Johnson on at least 4 occasions. As for the current presidential race: unless and until you can prove to me that he is a liability AND that you have a better candidate, my support remains 100% with Joe Biden. Unless and until you can prove to me that the GOP can "lock him up" to keep him away from teenage girls, Trump and the Trump surrogates, such as my Republican opponent Elise Stefanik, should be the ones asked to step aside. You just don't get to loudly, repeatedly, and on your taxpayer-funded House.gov site support the person who perpetuated these crimes on young girls and still call yourself aligned with moral values, supportive of women, and supportive of children. I repeat: Katie Johnson was 13 years old. Elsie Stefanik did not commit the crimes described above. But she does a tremendous disservice to the country by supporting the man who did. I'm not talking about guilt by association. I am questioning her moral judgment in lending support to the man who could commit such vile acts as described in court filings. If you don't believe Katie Johnson, fine. We have testimony from many other women throughout Donald Trump's adult life. Trump's horrific official acts and unofficial acts are in the past. We look to the Heritage Foundation's Project 2025 to learn about how the Trump administration will commit other horrific acts towards the goal of literally dismantling our government. Thanks, SCOTUS, for the pre-game show we saw in your decisions last week. I thought the GOP was supposed to be about conservative family values. How in the world could Stefanik, as a 40-year-old woman with a small child , offer her 100% Ultra MAGA support to Donald Trump and still claim to protect those GOP conservative family values? And now that she is in lock-step with Trump's agenda, how can she expect us to believe that she has good judgment when it comes to representing the people of NY-21? It's July the 4th. I should be writing about freedom from chaos and tyranny. For now, I'm off to the Best 4th in the North Parade in Ticonderoga, mindful of what Heritage Foundation President Kevin Roberts called the "Second American Revolution", which he says could be "bloodless if the left allows it to be." Maybe I'll see Elise and get to ask her about conservative family values. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Gov. Gavin Newsom (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: I just met with Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I just left the White House after meeting with President Biden and a number of other governors. | | |
---
I just left the White House after meeting with President Biden and a number of other governors. I heard three words from him tonight -- he’s all in. And so am I. Look at the last three and a half years of Joe Biden as president. It's been a master class: 15.6 million jobs created -- 8x more than the last three Republican presidents combined; gun safety legislation enacted; the cost of prescription drugs lowered; an infrastructure package to rebuild this country. **Joe Biden has delivered -- and we need to deliver for him at this moment. We're talking about the fate and future of our democracy, this country and the world. They all need us right now.** That's what I intend to do, and I hope you'll join me. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Supreme Court just violated the principle that no one is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter,

**This week the Supreme Court granted Donald Trump _immunity_ for “official acts” he took as president.**

This decision is dangerous, anti-democratic, and unprecedented. Trump promised that he would be a dictator on day one of a second term. Now, if he gets the opportunity, that is exactly what he will be.

Trump promised he would go after his political enemies, like those on the January 6th Committee.

With their 6-3 decision in _Trump v. United States_ , the Court’s ultra-conservative justices just rolled out the red carpet.

[This extremist Supreme Court, with a majority of its justices appointed by Republican presidents who lost the popular vote, has issued a decision that will live in infamy. It is now clear that defeating Trump at the ballot box is our only way forward to save our democracy. Please rush a split $10 donation between UNITEDemocrats and my campaign to help me respond to this shocking Supreme Court decision by redoubling our efforts to win this Senate race, defend the majority, win back the House, and defeat Trump.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88204284/483493512/-1657774271?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240703_EMSPL_E3_T0_GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhYWJmZTgwLWFiMzktZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5IDgS8ILrqcxRkSQ0ZIxW0E0TJIQye7OLfggKYxJ4lc=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88204290/483493518/-1657774271?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20240703_EMSPL_E3_T0_GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhYWJmZTgwLWFiMzktZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5IDgS8ILrqcxRkSQ0ZIxW0E0TJIQye7OLfggKYxJ4lc=)

This shocking, destructive decision that Donald Trump **will have immunity for official acts** validates the former president’s attempts to undermine our democracy.

It flies in the face of our founding principles that no one, not even the president, is above the law.

If our leaders can be immune from liability for criminal acts like overturning the outcome of an election, it may be the end of our republic.

It’s shameful, it’s dangerous, and the Court knows it.

This partisan Supreme Court just doesn’t care — and worse, the extremist justices are _actively empowering a president to be a king._

Our country is in grave danger if we allow any president to stay in power after losing and being held immune from consequences.

**It is clearer than ever that the _first_ and _last_ line of defense for our democracy is the ballot box, not the courts.

clean_body: | Peter, This week the Supreme Court granted Donald Trump immunity for “official acts” he took as president. This decision is dangerous, anti-democratic, and unprecedented. Trump promised that he would be a dictator on day one of a second term. Now, if he gets the opportunity, that is exactly what he will be. Trump promised he would go after his political enemies, like those on the January 6th Committee. With their 6-3 decision in Trump v. United States , the Court’s ultra-conservative justices just rolled out the red carpet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = This shocking, destructive decision that Donald Trump will have immunity for official acts validates the former president’s attempts to undermine our democracy. It flies in the face of our founding principles that no one, not even the president, is above the law. If our leaders can be immune from liability for criminal acts like overturning the outcome of an election, it may be the end of our republic. It’s shameful, it’s dangerous, and the Court knows it. This partisan Supreme Court just doesn’t care — and worse, the extremist justices are actively empowering a president to be a king. Our country is in grave danger if we allow any president to stay in power after losing and being held immune from consequences. It is clearer than ever that the first and last line of defense for our democracy is the ballot box, not the courts. This November, we must put an end to Trump’s dictatorial ambitions once and for all. name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Expand the Supreme Court to Stop MAGA Judges’ Relentless Power Grab
body:
Help us reach 10,000 signatures from grassroots members like you.

| | | |
---
| |
## **TAKE ACTION: Tell Congress to Expand the Supreme Court to Stop MAGA Judges’ Relentless Power Grab**
After the recent decisions in _Trump v. United States, Ohio v. EPA_ ,and _Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo_ , grassroots activists around the country are calling for action to stop the MAGA Justices’ power grab on behalf of far-right special interests, which will have devastating consequences for our environment and health. Congress has the authority to hold the Supreme Court accountable and to set the number of Justices on the Court. [**_It’s past time for lawmakers to expand and rebalance the Court — help us deliver 10,000 signatures calling for immediate action._**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | | [ TAKE ACTION NOW ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | | | Peter — the MAGA Justices on the captured Supreme Court just put Donald Trump above the law and grabbed even more power to serve special interests at the expense of Americans’ right to breathe clean air, to drink clean water, to exercise a truly equal right to vote, and to make fundamental reproductive health decisions.
---
| | This week, shockingly the MAGA Supreme Court granted immunity in _Trump vs. the United States_ and put our very democracy at risk because for democracy to endure, no one – especially not the president – can be above the law. In _Ohio v. EPA_ and _Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo_ , they made it even harder for scientists and experts at agencies like the EPA to protect the air we breathe and the water we drink — and even easier for billionaires and corporate interests like Big Oil to get their way. Billionaires and corporations have showered MAGA Justices on the Supreme Court with luxury gifts and travel, and oil billionaire Charles Koch even backed some of the lawyers who brought these anti-environment cases. Once again, those investments paid off.
---
| | Peter — for the sake of our communities, our democracy and our planet, it’s past time to expand and rebalance the Supreme Court. [**Sign our petition to Congress right now. It only takes a moment to help us reach our 10,000 signature goal >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Adding seats to the Supreme Court would allow the president to appoint new justices who will work for the people, not deep-pocketed polluters and MAGA extremists. Following the news, there has been a groundswell of grassroots activism around the country — an outcry for change on the Court.
---
| | Today, **we’re calling on all LCV members to submit a message to their lawmakers in Congress in support of the Judiciary Act to expand and rebalance the Supreme Court.** We need to raise pressure for action now, before the MAGA Justices cause even more damage to our health, our freedoms, and our planet.
---
| | [**_Tell Congress: Pass the Judiciary Act to Expand the Supreme Court. You have the authority. It’s past time to act. We’re aiming to submit 10,000 letters before the end of the month._**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_)
---
| | Protections for our environment, our reproductive rights, our equality, and our democracy are only as strong as the judges who uphold them. We have to stand up for our rights to breathe clean air and drink clean water, have our votes counted, make our own health decisions, and more.
---
| | Thank you for speaking out today, Peter. We’ll be in touch soon with more updates on our campaigns.
---
| | Onward,
---
| | Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & DemocracyLeague of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11204158&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjAyMDA2ODU3MgS2&spReportId=MjAyMDA2ODU3MgS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11204158&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjAyMDA2ODU3MgS2&spReportId=MjAyMDA2ODU3MgS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|
* * *
---

name: SIGN THE LETTER (VPP)
subject: Thank Justice Sotomayor >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
She just SLAMMED Trump’s justices
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71342?t=6&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b) Justice Sotomayor issued a SCATHING dissent condemning the MAGA Supreme Court majority’s immunity decision. _She’s a HERO!_

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71343?t=7&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71343?t=8&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_Thank you for standing up for our democracy against the far-right MAGA Supreme Court majority._**

This immunity decision is DISASTROUS news for the future of our country, paving the way for Donald Trump to be let off the hook for his crimes!

**And I know their extremist attacks are far from over.**

This is the same MAGA majority that DEMOLISHED _Roe v. Wade,_ OBLITERATED affirmative action, and sided with January 6 INSURRECTIONISTS!

I’m sick and tired of their antics — so I’m doing everything in my power to SAVE the White House and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71343?t=9&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71343?t=10&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15450%2E878179%2EFXXw6b).**

name: Christine Drazan
subject: This isn’t just a setback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan
body:
it’s a surrender to chaos and lawlessness
Friend,The Supreme Court has ruled in favor of Grants Pass, allowing cities to restore their once vibrant communities, as they work to solve the homelessness crisis and get people the help they need. While this should be a victory for local control and common sense - we are facing a harsh reality in Oregon. Our own state government in Salem has tied our hands. **They've enshrined in statute a disastrous law --HB3115--that legalizes tent cities across Oregon.** [TELL KOTEK AND THE DEMOCRATS: REPEAL HB3115!](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-r/) _This isn't just a setback;**it's a surrender to chaos and lawlessness.**_ We cannot stand idly by while Oregon descends into disorder. It's time to act decisively. [**We have to come together and demand accountability from Tina Kotek and the Democrats in Salem.**](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-y/) [TELL KOTEK AND THE DEMOCRATS: REPEAL HB3115!](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-j/) They pushed this disastrous law through, ignoring the concerns of hardworking Oregonians like you and me.[**Sign our petition today to repeal HB3115 and restore sanity to Oregon's streets. We need every voice, every signature to send a clear message: enough is enough.**](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-t/) [TELL KOTEK AND THE DEMOCRATS: REPEAL HB3115!](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-i/) _Together, we can lead Oregon in a new direction --**one that prioritizes safety, prosperity, and respect for our communities.**_ Join me in this fight for our future.Thank you, Christine Drazan [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-k/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-u/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mjtkuky-dihkkhuuli-o/) Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 04, 2024

AOC caught up in
impeachment plans that have left Washington, D.C. stunned beyond
belief

Rep. Ocasio-Cortez is known for making headlines. But
she's constantly making them for all the wrong reasons.

And AOC has been caught up in
impeachment plans that have left Washington, D.C. stunned beyond
belief.
➞ Continue Reading

HQ Open This Saturday--Volunteers Needed | | | | | [](https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=bf72141dce&e=98be86514c)

|
# It’s Time To Turn In Postcards
---
| Thank you to all the wonderful Volunteers who took postcards home to handwrite a special message! It’s time to turn in those last remaining ones out there. Please send an email to Rhonda@kimgeorgeforarizona.com to make arrangements to turn them in before Saturday.THANK YOU!!!
---
|
# Volunteers Needed July 6th
---
| Your help is needed at campaign headquarters on Saturday, July 6, from 9am-3pm!
We will be placing address labels and postage on thousands of postcards that will be mailed to Voters throughout CD1, asking them to vote for Kim in the primary. Feel free to stop in early or late. The campaign team will be there.
Lunch and beverages will be provided.
Thank you in advance for your help on Saturday and throughout the campaign. We’ve made tremendous progress and couldn’t have done it without the generous support of our amazing Volunteers!
See you Saturday and keep fighting! With God, all things are possible.
HQ: 10603 N. Hayden Road, Suite 108, Scottsdale
---

• Said that the Nazi march in Charlottesville was "made up."
• Said on January 6th that "we were respected all over the world."

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: upfront and honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you’ll indulge me, I’d like to go into more detail now:

| |

---
| | | I want to be upfront and honest about this:

We just missed the single most important fundraising goal of the Election Year. I should have explained the stakes of our Mid-Year deadline better, _**[but if you'll indulge me, I'd like to go into more detail now:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bhldrhbimt8rsht6pkv00ak4bvr8kv3g08av4o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "but if you’ll indulge me, I’d like to go into more detail now:")**_
- This was our FIRST deadline since Trump was convicted in a rigged court - This was our FIRST deadline since the presidential debate - This was our LAST deadline before the Republican National Convention - This was our LAST deadline before Trump's sham sentencing
These are all election-defining moments and we failed to reach our fundraising goal at the worst possible time. **And if this email doesn 't work, I'm afraid we'll be forced to pull our ads off the airwaves, slash our voter contact budgets, and cut back critical get-out-the-vote initiatives.**

_So consider this message a Hail Mary._

I set a goal of raising 250,000 dollars between now and the 4th of July. It's a lofty goal but that's the BARE MINIMUM we'd need to fully fund all our campaign operations.

_After missing our deadline, this is truly a make-or-break moment for Conservatives._

The last thing I wanted was to come to you with an urgent message - especially after everyone came out of the woodwork to ask you for money at the end of the month...

_**[But when the fate of our country hangs in the balance, I'm not leaving anything to chance. I'm here to win. I'm here to save our Conservative House Majority, win a supermajority in the Senate, and reelect President Trump.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt836lcirnupfk7hj8e4k73mjeiato98es3qgq5o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "But when the fate of our country hangs in the balance, I’m not leaving anything to chance. I’m here to win. I’m here to save our Conservative House Majority, win a supermajority in the Senate, and reelect President Trump.")**_

If that means sending one last fundraising email, I'll do what I must.

So with all that being said, here's my final pitch to you:

**This quarter was important before ... but after Trump's sham conviction and the presidential debate - and just days before our Convention AND Trump's sentencing - this is officially our most important deadline yet.**

There's still time to right this ship so I'm humbly asking you to donate before July 4th.
---
| | | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc6ler0q9js02o0n562akm9rf247sos68t3esh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---
Thanks for all you do,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbatlj5d83oo2kad8frm8dajrobd47lpj3hldslg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

I'm launching my brand new _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zerf5orsvr7tqco3vrt2lr1je219sl4p9cura9og_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.
---
| | | [START YOUR CHECK-IN >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zotlblnm5r4ue2nolbnctug7kb725dan0g7b1l3o_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0c1geeoj5c1h2bs "START YOUR CHECK-IN")
---
Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise
