# THURSDAY, JULY 4, 2024
---|---
**Happy Fourth of July**! On this day in 1884, the completed [Statue of Liberty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGngc3oODtxGDx0YUvXjsgx53CVgyP7AuLtq0YdO3_Lr__rOl09J17vn_5BTmKefBDeaLLKKDSTaWcXiZB0S663CD3A2WC7OKTbCcHoIQwBhz6QHuwFQgRCDBFsyw4BDVgwPQBq6LyleLan_tZfgh5OujFAM0su3XfmVRaK6cgblS7kR5vcIvKsjf5ocGxw3Pe9W7hKLsevNzjKwlXN_lC8qj9pcIzFr4HUnTeqqoqXF6kcVeIbFTmUZPVaWWh-G1UVC9M614WfbXHzc-eUuJ5tY-D-8JzeLfLvmM3hTwAAAP__LeBoCA) was formally presented to the U.S. ambassador in a ceremony in Paris, France, commemorating the friendship between France and the United States. In between grilling and hanging out, we're working today to put together a shortened holiday _Flyover_ for your reading pleasure tomorrow. Have a safe holiday, everyone! Did you click on something you really enjoyed in today's _Flyover?_ Let us know how we're doing by replying to this e-mail. Start speaking a new language in just 3 weeks with today's sponsor, [Babbel.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0E2PojAcgPFPU26SvtJy6GF3Fc1GzBhidLiQAv9ClbfBjozffuKc5_47PHnOaZEa17mhOZgetLdjYSrvHlDIFV9RXvCg1haAAgtAE0kxwTjiNGi1sIapuoxrKoQEThhXhNUll2VcWVXWgdMUU44l5gRjynBoJNhIClISVbFYMMQx1M6Pc3gd3eBbsN1zfMAcVmMfdLr1froj9gfRBNFkWZawBzd4mCuY_MsgmjAZM3pENBEijbKXZElRgP1AbP1sLKu2bxuzO6k8vqdTnp05kc0h-rsMaw9wu5FNnm0P6msvV7C7ZMl-vuauH6SoWqZOx9Fkt8_ofSj-k92F_CvdSR2DWdfT4rrO3SOJOG5647qfYv_rvoem3wEAAP__wtNulg)
|
---
## Thompson Fire Rages Near Sacramento
An evacuation order was issued for [28,000 residents in Oroville, California](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO2yAURp8Gb1j4giEeGLp4S9eOFoFLcisMFhBbefsqnf_1-85wdP7ct7ujRPn52-1oeyyb851O3AxXHNSmhmAjIqAc0E4GxCSEVjC87G1ZZgATYY43IUFJPYeg1eSUXiY9x4EsCFDCCDUJAVKMzmDUZp4e083LZZZMCQzUSx3_Fsr9hTF9yol19GUfkn31fjQmfzFYGazXdY3-0TJe7fszWJvz1e2Ye2GwfvcvRSlEqsgp88e7d-S-vHP_8KOW_eiN4-n823UqmZcasDae0VVeajkpJWSwDtWG46KUqGnDlHjujtJ_pf5jn9PCvwAAAP__OqFphw), due to the rapidly spreading Thompson Fire. The blaze, which ignited around 11 a.m. Pacific time on Tuesday, has already consumed more than 3,568 acres in Butte County, 65 miles north of Sacramento. Despite the efforts of 400 fire personnel, six helicopters, and six air tankers, the fire remains 0% contained. [Here's a video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnMZuRfT5wMnjowpauHZFjzuEqwyGwQHn7qp07_8MvfV-P8RG58Pr6jAuFmmWMqfJJo9eoAUdsppCJgFxDwXow1pgeoZkDphyfnXl6TCl39madTf29d9C7hJFSwwEMoPEGrTHgTBs95d539mlvyd07p9DQxFX29lt4rTPl8paT9jbJ0pQw17odyn0oGBQM13W17ziL_FYFw0rXoWA4eSLRdZZlO2TVmXfSKRbOsq8cdZY90aFt1zl04Gw716U0e5i2i0vho_cKzWuJXP6m9V-BM8BPAAAA___Qll2b). The Hyatt Powerplant was taken offline Wednesday morning due to de-energized powerlines, and employees were evacuated.
## Biden Undeterred by Polling and Calls to Exit
President Biden vowed [to keep running for reelection](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb_G7ohgGHtCQfGadHntlhbgIZ6IGMtmE-1-_Spbb3evTnN0Pq7TNUiR9fY_PNi3XKeQmjx5IoUKcMJ-9pkZ2PbsDYE2Wo8I_eKtQZcdWDbOWR7H6CLGQITWBErZ9uJBA2rSaLQGq0-BOI80mGjOybrBdqh5llb3073K2hbO5as-eT-l-uiLX1rbjs7-6-DSwSVsK7-ON3qfvUkq3MFl2_mQmdem7pVVfE_1WqSxWurnwerOOatv4bUdisihGYZkICY6J31GxuhGHHBgiJT73c_bS0qRY6QO9e0RpPzKtD_LPD38BAAA__82WGPO) on Wednesday despite growing calls for him to withdraw from fellow Democrats and drastic changes in polls. House Democrat Raul Grijalva became the [second sitting lawmaker ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOwyAQBb8GOiJY1iEpKK5xl2uvtIhZwkbYRJg4ur8_JfV1T3oajTQ_l-kSuPB6-w4L-Z7qFObOO01OoQKcUEafiICsJG8caKP1EUFmbyMG0MlFsGcbrpASxjNYNAYCxZOT7EEDaqfRaA1WH4KjdHSDuZrTbM-DFagpcq_tcK-89kyp_Nad2mGuiyw-9_7YhP0SMAoYe6bMpbw_AWOuC6302j7zuZGAEd2Agx1UC8-ibo3voexB3SupK0daVWz1oeqzq0hLnVvob1g2Hx8vLoW3oxOob0vgj0P2f2PsHv4CAAD__4hFYQs)after Texas Rep. Lloyd Doggett to publicly urge Biden to step down. Grijalva said it was time for the Democratic Party to select a new nominee. According to [a new CBS poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tuhDAQAL_GdEbrxeCjcJGG7tKmRH4sd44MRmYPlL-PLnW6kaYYzdd9vruU0_b4dCtZXsrsAqeTZiO1RD3rJtqFCKlryCqDoAAGjc3TLjfsg-u9D9EHcIsayQ3jGIzqFIZeNckioAYDWgFgB60ztAymV17dQjf2ndBAMXGp7XdJGz9pyT_lpNqGsjbZPpn3Q3QfAieB03VdbfDHRtfx9gKnNwqcuL7WXfoUaZN7yVlG8o5JRlpLqI4Pya-6lRcLnJpq436lnNMxGKHhsbqU_3L87_tp8TcAAP__PnNdKQ), Biden now trails former President Trump by 3 points in battleground states and 2 points nationally. A New York Times/Siena College poll has [Trump leading Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGngY3ofJwNGRi6eEvXjhaYc3wVNpZDE_Xtq3bu_Ev_8H3cpluUIvv9PW4c2lKnODd58uQMGaSJdA4LM7LVHDqH0AEMhHoNTHHJKaH1gwOmPkWPqfMu20Tx6r2WgIAEDqgDQAuX6HgZXN-lzs_22ltFwFlaPS-fVfa28lK-65PPy1w3XcLa2vFQ9k3hqHBsK69Sym9TOK51451fD4XjHLcjyn1XOJLrCaw37fzaDpMk824yp9jYFI7ZHLUUhaM-Qz5eUoo8BqcI7luUv7Fu_wo8A_4EAAD__4UpXOI) by 6 points, up 3 points from last week's results. It was Trump's best showing in a Times/Siena poll since 2015.
## July 4 Brings Drones, Higher Prices
If you're hosting a Fourth of July barbecue for ten, expect [to spend an average of $71.22](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRvRcT6bZGDowpauHS2Mj0CEg4tJIr991c6d_-GXvq_rdHUpp8ft061sWiiT8y29eNKSJNJE3WICM3LfsVEaQQGMhF00C5NTPHMYlQ8O1EDh7C8ayfF44UF3ySAggQZSANjDyWkOox7UrM6-vwy9IOAltVJP95IeLXLIR3lxPfmydtnE1rZd9B8CrUDrZq_63yLQbmVvAm3kyruM5S3XUlke5Zmz3Dd-LDKUZ21R3p_5kPP8LdCqAZDUeRBou2qW7Z1yTvuoBcFtdSn_Tdu_Ai-DPwEAAP__uHNclg)--a record high that's 5% more than last year and 30% higher than in 2019 before the pandemic. (AP) | | | | | | THURSDAY, JULY 4, 2024 ---|--- Happy Fourth of July! On this day in 1884, the completed was formally presented to the U.S. ambassador in a ceremony in Paris, France, commemorating the friendship between France and the United States. Start speaking a new language in just 3 weeks with today's sponsor, | Thompson Fire Rages Near Sacramento An evacuation order was issued for , due to the rapidly spreading Thompson Fire. The blaze, which ignited around 11 a.m. Pacific time on Tuesday, has already consumed more than 3,568 acres in Butte County, 65 miles north of Sacramento. Despite the efforts of 400 fire personnel, six helicopters, and six air tankers, the fire remains 0% contained. . The Hyatt Powerplant was taken offline Wednesday morning due to de-energized powerlines, and employees were evacuated. Biden Undeterred by Polling and Calls to Exit President Biden vowed on Wednesday despite growing calls for him to withdraw from fellow Democrats and drastic changes in polls. House Democrat Raul Grijalva became the Texas Rep. Lloyd Doggett to publicly urge Biden to step down. Grijalva said it was time for the Democratic Party to select a new nominee. According to , Biden now trails former President Trump by 3 points in battleground states and 2 points nationally. A New York Times/Siena College poll has by 6 points, up 3 points from last week's results. It was Trump's best showing in a Times/Siena poll since 2015. July 4 Brings Drones, Higher Prices If you're hosting a Fourth of July barbecue for ten, expect record high that's 5% more than last year and 30% higher than in 2019 before the pandemic. As the nation grapples with record-breaking heat and devastating wildfires, many municipalities have opted for Fourth of July fireworks. If you're still planning a private pyrotechnics display, be sure to check local and state regulations, as limits may be in place; . If you run out of supplies, be sure to check today to ensure a smooth and enjoyable celebration. ---
Italian, early 18th century
| |
---
Drop the "e" from "virtue" and we have this noun that specifies a personal quality of knowledge of the arts. "Virtu" was borrowed from the Italian "virtù," which originated from the Latin "virtutem," meaning "virtue, goodness, manliness." It was adopted during a period of history when European habits and traditions, particularly those of Italian origin, were considered the height of culture around the world. ...

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The Connection Between Faith and Freedom
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_e=2nKhi_vNRYOGwB0CytJdiDhI3mn6l2URruqg5mSaJ7hhlKotXsh8aSXKeDscCiEXmb_Aa-3fDAdpGED3DtsxJtX5nimLqO7T7AA1DCBfuVNehz4jsynGUt7L8ScDDKnOsccsXa1PwC3mm-MsQn8-5KaHb5G5LHb8I6icGjQANUScJSktOHALbaEbIg2IQe5Wt8ZSksAK2ViEheJRq2mr2kidY9aDfLlvOoTnk1LLVEIQBtpZ7kXGfEE8cc2lt_AZyZtsTKvrQKXEf7IL1PWhF6xT_9EX_lQhtQLtsSKxMQhv6M-gxuMKE5vZWdXavoAaqwDgKYB3PP_a74KTikg-X9NbEAw4ZU6B2LSSD4bgXsR0bd8yCU-hreg0hkyFuSXa15SKdf2UxAPXFigHR8siZw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_e=2nKhi_vNRYOGwB0CytJdiDhI3mn6l2URruqg5mSaJ7hhlKotXsh8aSXKeDscCiEXmb_Aa-3fDAdpGED3DtsxJtX5nimLqO7T7AA1DCBfuVNehz4jsynGUt7L8ScDDKnOsccsXa1PwC3mm-MsQn8-5KaHb5G5LHb8I6icGjQANUScJSktOHALbaEbIg2IQe5Wt8ZSksAK2ViEheJRq2mr2kidY9aDfLlvOoTnk1LLVEIQBtpZ7kXGfEE8cc2lt_AZ0Rv3vue4kkUOIIvymr1PE9Z8WSpHYoJ1qc2_uzIpoUJxtCbEcHfVzQQT6XHj0rcm8cKIrV-GF3Gm3GgkFBNAzrGNqQLfT7XjkxtSKL3DEEHf-9d5bUxCRM-JfGHSpM9s2AS7kkcSXLRcXkrDpX2sVg%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_e=2nKhi_vNRYOGwB0CytJdiDhI3mn6l2URruqg5mSaJ7hhlKotXsh8aSXKeDscCiEXmb_Aa-3fDAdpGED3DtsxJtX5nimLqO7T7AA1DCBfuVNehz4jsynGUt7L8ScDDKnOsccsXa1PwC3mm-MsQn8-5KaHb5G5LHb8I6icGjQANUScJSktOHALbaEbIg2IQe5Wt8ZSksAK2ViEheJRq2mr2kidY9aDfLlvOoTnk1LLVEIQBtpZ7kXGfEE8cc2lt_AZaY-P6PPFrGTCuts4cXw3GK51VW1aInMBFSaZ9uuoIrn12MjxB3-OtxqEoQgIy1FaiY4ZGmp7-JcJ_8iTx4mWmXQVXzpYiJUUXjVL5g2pbF-0sXo1ptputAbN6PTu_tuDytAaJlAI8cN0jLx88BmvrA%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_t=JTxd6IhGdRH_aPXhMi3eiMdv-WNAG1iGxYl0ZHaL1fpEMGUqLTezlfXgcK5_lQmAVNINeEVd6m539nbfiFjcZVS7Zo8AdReIhvelk_RGD5DVcxZzlfzUrC2OrSWHtW7swgke1V-mXTyz0vocWN-yeocywqRS6t8p8pVj4tp44bo%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_e=j2-52b9qdvl18jaCGkvxncCBAFGbkCZM1cfuJbl-WtnaUUYY_XzgimxK2gda0BEyUh4l5dLr_Jce-TGviHmSht0TLJbkrDHoIvV_mdo4z9ERmdW-BclNud0kUO1LdXwZtQ5PgYi2SYoKR_F1HgMxRX-C04pfPgr4F0GsEzxDqpc7c2caIgp77TsS4WDgISPcEWd6SVJhFyA-KyUGGpbrPFKqloMTsik0fOuy2DGsTGwiMHbzFCCcz-9gw0L85IXhnJ8m12jBkih0n0W_SGF2llkAmeIDG7_qTzuOXCCiPsE%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e0a05532e8014aafa9cf25f9a8867902&_e=2nKhi_vNRYOGwB0CytJdiHHl1blcbp8oM18tva1lDm8QKev0ErZn0d0OfAPYQReOSfOglMjcyajB5I62G__rXp_TAaCaRLJJ5oUiQsJ3U1Vb5S7ILMUa3bT92bhVjRfAUgi0b16A7VC6t2B23O-yv9adYn_x63yqvrHI63mOPXgfq1pLLEl5WcFI-ygwx-PvNG3cjkcAbSqgAuwL3KeuQ4L10wzFajrAnlk3242hxGQ%3D)_

body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9e5867a4b46b47c196712162884ca016&_e=DAyCxEpUTRyt5VMh_FrIcoKiOLNnrJDcll0a5jjRheFYO4DmSA1B-k-phIJlzn_38pXcR17NrUc4Feld6tkIGH0hCSM9ZJHmvK3cX7BNlsuz8Cpgn80PlomGFYw31Kdg0TGsL1a11JI3wQneeY1kH5HO2dnDKpOxne0xvHup4oiu8XWIvnLNppkh2mmKQmjh8zjzcoqotd0U2oflZPGGtpPB_PkndXfMlgkpGxfC1eGjqc8NnjwZCUuX6hW7xKUdS3wbq8DzcbjNBlz0YC6Wd5i7liAn6_sjZ6ttxxLfFWxXhwRG11DCXPxsm_DP2DVSU5gVKoTUSt0U3ch_V0fTuYsb1juR3fvgvZgfjgyBBHuA8AHj5C7Hl4YFBvS5pASgW2MAy5vY4IS4OsL8kbCEAw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9e5867a4b46b47c196712162884ca016&_e=DAyCxEpUTRyt5VMh_FrIcoKiOLNnrJDcll0a5jjRheFYO4DmSA1B-k-phIJlzn_38pXcR17NrUc4Feld6tkIGH0hCSM9ZJHmvK3cX7BNlsuz8Cpgn80PlomGFYw31Kdg0TGsL1a11JI3wQneeY1kH5HO2dnDKpOxne0xvHup4oiu8XWIvnLNppkh2mmKQmjh8zjzcoqotd0U2oflZPGGtpPB_PkndXfMlgkpGxfC1eGjqc8NnjwZCUuX6hW7xKUdEIb-s9fd-AxQ4Mz6OjBlUzmRtPfXyi-uc8ncGOQj0GJ94iLeVOUgMwUAA-SWzzCnxp7VfGHbefWIgB06zcQRWnaBlRveleXrAiaPAY_bgwlJyaeJSSgm9SuTHxcC3FmS5duTiAGzRnwEjBcKsQ9lXg%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9e5867a4b46b47c196712162884ca016&_e=DAyCxEpUTRyt5VMh_FrIcoKiOLNnrJDcll0a5jjRheFYO4DmSA1B-k-phIJlzn_38pXcR17NrUc4Feld6tkIGH0hCSM9ZJHmvK3cX7BNlsuz8Cpgn80PlomGFYw31Kdg0TGsL1a11JI3wQneeY1kH5HO2dnDKpOxne0xvHup4oiu8XWIvnLNppkh2mmKQmjh8zjzcoqotd0U2oflZPGGtpPB_PkndXfMlgkpGxfC1eGjqc8NnjwZCUuX6hW7xKUdDDkK2tbaX0KdXRSgMQKdL6xzQUnJYebTVHbkYaX4wCLciVWQfE-8DOH3Di7hejV_16kxAVDfRD0VNV8PEnR2tFOzfHrHE4H5e_JT7HQFNkDt6escXx9RVbXqdaHDuPtCKynr22xgfcRmI6QXEjLREw%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Reclaiming American Freedom

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Erosion of traditional values
body:
The family's pivotal role in our society is under threat

| From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

Our new book, _The Perilous Fight_ , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rrrHeJ9-gtHZYl-QKWPw_A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoaRNmP0TRaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvdGhlLXBlcmlsb3VzLWZpZ2h0LWZyZWUtY2hhcHRlci8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRoZXBlcmlsb3VzZmlnaHRfZnJlZWNoYXB0ZXImdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTI0MDZFUDAwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1WMV9QQS1BVkQtMjAyNDA3MDRXA3NwY0IKZn2YfYZmBXEy71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) In _The Perilous Fight_ , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units.

**[**As someone committed to the promotion of truth and values, I am offering you access to the first chapter of our book for free. This limited-time offer will give you a glimpse into the vital issues we explore and the solutions we propose.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rrrHeJ9-gtHZYl-QKWPw_A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoaRNmP0TRaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvdGhlLXBlcmlsb3VzLWZpZ2h0LWZyZWUtY2hhcHRlci8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRoZXBlcmlsb3VzZmlnaHRfZnJlZWNoYXB0ZXImdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTI0MDZFUDAwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1WMV9QQS1BVkQtMjAyNDA3MDRXA3NwY0IKZn2YfYZmBXEy71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** I invite you to request access to your free chapter today if you want to:
* Understand the current challenges American families face;

* Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and community; and

* Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values and promote societal stability

The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing faith, liberty, community, and life. By downloading the first chapter, you are taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its very heart--the family.

Don't wait - this free offer is only available for a limited time.

[Click here to download your free chapter of _The Perilous Fight_ now and join us in the mission to strengthen American families.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rrrHeJ9-gtHZYl-QKWPw_A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoaRNmP0TRaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvdGhlLXBlcmlsb3VzLWZpZ2h0LWZyZWUtY2hhcHRlci8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRoZXBlcmlsb3VzZmlnaHRfZnJlZWNoYXB0ZXImdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTI0MDZFUDAwMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1WMV9QQS1BVkQtMjAyNDA3MDRXA3NwY0IKZn2YfYZmBXEy71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

body:

| | | |

| | Happy Fourth of July! Before we hit the streets for the big parade in Farragut, I wanted to take a moment to send you a quick message, friend. Today marks a special moment in our history—248 years of American independence! It’s a time to come together with family and friends, enjoy some good barbecue, watch fireworks light up the sky, and celebrate the freedoms we hold dear. Our great nation, founded on the principles of equality, liberty, and opportunity, stands as a beacon of hope and freedom. These values are the heart and soul of America, and they’re what make us proud to call this country our home. However, not everyone shares our love and respect for these ideals. There are those on the Left who continually criticize America and undermine our God-given rights. They refuse to support our brave troops and even go so far as to praise terrorist organizations in Gaza, which is a dadgum embarrassment to even type out. So in times like these, friend, it’s more important than ever to be unapologetically patriotic. We must stand firm, defend our values, and ensure that the America we pass on to our children and grandchildren remains the land of the free and the home of the brave. As we celebrate this Independence Day, let’s remember the sacrifices made by those who came before us and honor their legacy by standing strong and united. We are blessed to live in the greatest nation on Earth, and it’s our duty to keep it that way. Thank you for standing with me in support of our beloved country. Wishing you all a joyful and patriotic Fourth of July. God bless America!
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=bace09b143d9459fb1fec0f88f11ca67&_e=W7CoKlanrshY9BcEaHrsibbVZB1oyT2g9eq6DU5TJ4JVRWL492EordABTZ3o1oos7NMpfdGgE895aH4Prpg9nA4eNBqYeXQxZeev5KJjgjciQWUe7dXaQIiVdXzP-PpYnMkxRuMNudkObt9O6JnW_uD9OMjwnPkwqPiU4gzkScIbrfxWAbX8kT3kz0Sj9nCi6K8OHRBdOu8btZ2Lavm4OKJ1BW_66YfFcTqx4Is2qX1hL1y5wbJcheXnJuBbYP8S1tchQExAO-fzgcMYNK0NwBbgwkaMt-vlTri1QTfW02kdfWaXUy3kwuVo6zE3jEJ8lrVJu8dhN81bw9UgeOiHeRzaTLVsBrHG9Kcb1B3RWFI%3D)

Tim Burchett P.S. If you’re around Farragut, I’d love to see you at the parade. Let’s celebrate our freedom and the American spirit together!

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Religious Liberty is Under Serious Threat
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb545df0b7ef4bf9af1323eeba364c49&_e=ppz511JQULl2t6tSI3QUyt0uDIVKKgW-HO9h5KcH7rsiWXFNTnO8_C5PBTPt4YIIfTd256k-XhmmAaHhhrc--O6u4VpN5OfHzh9s7LLGDgGSn_rSeQjzn0N9nFQXWI81xKcnL4x2ITi3uVlbutke2va_kcF0iiZRwBHPDm5-NWgSTUVP4ArABHreX5YvjUbVMv5O1ZaI-sv9RWblYFHTO0UAskRA4PdN9pflobOizASGgrpvNaIU_ufvLNA3B40jb05IFXvRivLRYggjFSuxn9YD29KFsnyQXN_9KrBcEUHbXLicsdS2JcRLJkDkXC7AIMPNQtSyapYyNw3YbXnC82oPzMzgSs8oJJIEUfZz9Wqkc1F72LAyxPvBAFSF6syGAx2-O63sIITTWYsnAfdZrQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb545df0b7ef4bf9af1323eeba364c49&_e=ppz511JQULl2t6tSI3QUyt0uDIVKKgW-HO9h5KcH7rsiWXFNTnO8_C5PBTPt4YIIfTd256k-XhmmAaHhhrc--O6u4VpN5OfHzh9s7LLGDgGSn_rSeQjzn0N9nFQXWI81xKcnL4x2ITi3uVlbutke2va_kcF0iiZRwBHPDm5-NWgSTUVP4ArABHreX5YvjUbVMv5O1ZaI-sv9RWblYFHTO0UAskRA4PdN9pflobOizASGgrpvNaIU_ufvLNA3B40jgS51Uv5dVIEYt7LAP_zV0OOZ6IhvvyO8i-SxhPV7mXOhjVd5iCRO7CDUWLU9FN5YCy1Z9dWJju4WFslRUlDEWKMqDgUklOXlqpS109MKiX8JQRLvET0HPr_iLaYyZSheSP2Ug5LC-UpVv-E_cKoHbQ%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bb545df0b7ef4bf9af1323eeba364c49&_e=ppz511JQULl2t6tSI3QUyt0uDIVKKgW-HO9h5KcH7rsiWXFNTnO8_C5PBTPt4YIIfTd256k-XhmmAaHhhrc--O6u4VpN5OfHzh9s7LLGDgGSn_rSeQjzn0N9nFQXWI81xKcnL4x2ITi3uVlbutke2va_kcF0iiZRwBHPDm5-NWgSTUVP4ArABHreX5YvjUbVMv5O1ZaI-sv9RWblYFHTO0UAskRA4PdN9pflobOizASGgrpvNaIU_ufvLNA3B40jL5R5qrfzIH1fXF_kobhGzIT6ZM_BXzIJSg_lZTUmhHL7Qm_er7sBBYr9lg99TvMUhEssT-AYZQiNyg65vlfg4Q9CiTufVXZC9iQH1pnQjfQ8UNC0ZDMxbPM9PI8dgHe3E_OX6Hz9Ra8fmvZ9SLi4uA%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution

clean_body: I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism." Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| From 2015 to 2023, Congressman LaHood represented Illinois' 18th Congressional District. After redistricting, he now serves the new 16th District, which includes 21 counties across central and northwestern Illinois. Before Congress, LaHood served four years in the Illinois State Senate starting in 2011 and spent over nine years as a State and Federal Prosecutor, including as Chief Terrorism Prosecutor in Las Vegas. He later worked at a Peoria law firm until his House election.
LaHood serves on the House Ways and Means Committee, leading the Subcommittee on Work and Welfare, and is a member of the Trade Subcommittee. In March 2021, he joined the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and in January 2022, the House Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party. Darin is known for his conservative leadership, LaHood advocates for economic development, fiscal responsibility, national security, and rural healthcare.
Jerry Evans Republican Nominee IL-11

name: History Facts
subject: These three Presidents all died on July 4
body:
Since 1777, the Fourth of July has been celebrated as the day the United States of America formally broke from Great Britain and became an independent nation. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68zd51gujltpky8bshqvjgmvs02dxf7m5gxf9zc9scefw9nre24v0y1osg4hzse6o1aoang3ysexm4css5hjygizxaouclh42a9is3e65790r0c9zt29v4sfpa3lofrpint5qog9xeoovk3jx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [John Adams, Thomas Jefferson, and James Monroe all died on July 4.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| S ince 1777, the Fourth of July has been celebrated as the day the United States of America formally broke from Great Britain and became an independent nation. It’s a pretty stunning coincidence, then, that the day of the nation’s birth is also marked by the deaths of three separate Founding Fathers and early U.S. Presidents: Thomas Jefferson, John Adams, and James Monroe. More unlikely still, Adams and Jefferson died just hours apart on the exact same day: July 4, 1826, the 50th anniversary of American independence.
---
The fact that America’s second, third, and fifth Presidents all died on the [same day](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) has sparked a certain degree of speculation. In eulogies for Jefferson, mourners suggested he had willed himself to survive through illness until reaching the significant 50th anniversary milestone of the nation’s independence. ([According to various people](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) who were with him when he died, on the night of July 3 Jefferson said, “Is it the Fourth?” or a similar phrase.) Statesman Daniel Webster suggested divine intervention had played a role in the timing, to signal to the world that the United States was favored by heavenly providence. Others have offered a more sinister theory: that doctors deliberately prolonged Jefferson’s life until July Fourth and even had a hand in determining Adams’ final day, making sure that it fell on the historically significant date. Whatever the explanation, the coincidence has become woven into the history and mythology of the birth of the United States.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## John Adams’ last words were “Thomas Jefferson survives.”
Throughout their political careers, John Adams and Thomas Jefferson were close political colleagues, and sometimes fierce rivals. The two men met at the Continental Congress in 1775 and worked together on the committee to draft the Declaration of Independence. Their shared commitment to American independence sparked a close friendship, but that friendship was tested by the different visions the two men had for the future of the United States. Jefferson was an ardent defender of states’ rights, while Adams believed that the nation should be led by a strong central government. This fundamental disagreement in their politics led to a falling out, and after Jefferson defeated Adams in the presidential election of 1800, the two founding fathers didn’t speak to each other for 11 years. The tension lasted for the rest of their lives, though they were able to rekindle their friendship and begin speaking again. When Adams died on July 4, 1826, his last words were reported to be, [“Thomas Jefferson survives.”](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sg3ily&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Ironically, though Adams didn’t know it, Jefferson had died just hours earlier that same day.

| Peter,
Today, as we celebrate Independence Day, it's a momentous occasion to reflect on the courageous individuals who fought tirelessly for our freedom and the values we hold dear.
From the heroes of the American Revolution to the countless men and women who have defended our freedoms through the years, their sacrifices have shaped the fabric of our nation.
---
| [](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017g2anHBdpqCIfH2s24oEC163T6Inn9Afi_uQgZ1LohbSL9HEr_dFribdz-haVkRSG3iqD783IlayEGdxP47L5fUSkztuZ7JU3_6R4nJfw9UhC7tbhOrouHyat_-Vkwe3-fBlPQfYy9AeR0inE5UtXe2Erok7vU2JB-p6Iu04ozk=&c=f4iOZK9YLQTAbM52_Wa4_n9E4_htLyloaDNjDtvBgWkhayoM-A25eQ==&ch=zLyoIuOsQSSa34xuDBjRMFEF3gPcuzaFxf4iEHtGE2OJPrFq2w-9Og==)
---
| As we come together to celebrate this special day, let us honor the sacrifices of those who have paved the way for our freedom and reaffirm our dedication to preserving these ideals for future generations.
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy and meaningful Independence Day!
Russell Prescott
---

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire.

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, Today, as we celebrate Independence Day, it's a momentous occasion to reflect on the courageous individuals who fought tirelessly for our freedom and the values we hold dear. From the heroes of the American Revolution to the countless men and women who have defended our freedoms through the years, their sacrifices have shaped the fabric of our nation. | == | As we come together to celebrate this special day, let us honor the sacrifices of those who have paved the way for our freedom and reaffirm our dedication to preserving these ideals for future generations. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy and meaningful Independence Day! Russell Prescott | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. subject: I haven’t scratched my head this much since Law School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
This is it.

| [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f22ff78aedd14a7baf67168a3aeb3e5c&_e=OdkMWRlFJ2n3nMbvUdkHoJRkS5REo4CqQcAb8NvxQN4t0IfDJC7KniKcafR4JhvHIoUWI4TvVkaJf-QfQq-MSHIFXJDUhZ02uZ0IvtjDpy2OWMfl6PZQL2WVVS5DU120FcKorY0p5R_RKu7ibum7rbmBI57jvd1FbOmp7LqA6FkjqcPzdEiFLp1_164B3RH_qiipFsG0E2xO5FtlVZXph5QxKcvRQYSjc6VViA-hvq1KU33V-oI_EfEgWWgwPPxkmwJfsW3O46Z00xKUr6gLeTZguYgSSU6Xoa2hprC5DE0Npprq5Z7Zgf3OkbwiyFIJ4-_RWtJifcUid8i7VBA6jCEsPONgB3gAaJCT7Is6ELnZ6Qa0TShXkkVbJ7IyslJPcTpKYavpRi5x2BqkwuBovg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

**This is it for today. I 'm going to be honest with you. Right now - I'm drawing a blank.

I haven't scratched my head this much since Law School, and I feel like a dog chasing its tail because no matter what I do, nothing's working.**

Democrats have just about whipped the Red Wave back to where it started - and everything that we've built in this nation is in danger of being dismantled, scrapped, and forgotten. [**I need your help, and I need you to listen.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f22ff78aedd14a7baf67168a3aeb3e5c&_e=OdkMWRlFJ2n3nMbvUdkHoJRkS5REo4CqQcAb8NvxQN4t0IfDJC7KniKcafR4JhvHIoUWI4TvVkaJf-QfQq-MSHIFXJDUhZ02uZ0IvtjDpy2OWMfl6PZQL2WVVS5DU120FcKorY0p5R_RKu7ibum7rbmBI57jvd1FbOmp7LqA6FkjqcPzdEiFLp1_164B3RH_qiipFsG0E2xO5FtlVZXph5QxKcvRQYSjc6VViA-hvq211_w1EK0sorqF7Wy0Ra5ddpKJHT4WKzjBmvkIpHjmhngrLgk9qoBCWoeOOg9YNW_fw5bB_UODP610l4l4529gBNxy9FunQxEoYA0C_7qjWRZ40FGk2qWt1WOVMD5NsBE1b6ZN5lJzeRETxIjiHa24q3kYTNWgX7sG2M5LaqY7yg%3D%3D)

**I 've tried and tried again to ensure that we've got everything we need to Take Back the Senate in November, but everything I've done has proven about as useful as a football bat. Our fundraising is plummeting.

I'm getting phone calls from my staff hounding me to get back to work because they're saying that fundraising has halted entirely in the past few hours.**

Usually, I'd worry about more pressing matters on a Friday evening, but then I looked at the headlines and saw how much money the Democrats are raising. I had to heat up a pot of coffee and get to work.

**[I can't put my mind at ease until I've seen one more showing of support from EVERYBODY on Team Kennedy before Midnight.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f22ff78aedd14a7baf67168a3aeb3e5c&_e=OdkMWRlFJ2n3nMbvUdkHoJRkS5REo4CqQcAb8NvxQN4t0IfDJC7KniKcafR4JhvHIoUWI4TvVkaJf-QfQq-MSHIFXJDUhZ02uZ0IvtjDpy2OWMfl6PZQL2WVVS5DU120FcKorY0p5R_RKu7ibum7rbmBI57jvd1FbOmp7LqA6FkjqcPzdEiFLp1_164B3RH_qiipFsG0E2xO5FtlVZXph5QxKcvRQYSjc6VViA-hvq1hMVMZN7RkDXXeN4xmDG6OXeDUnxKMSJEnAFjPUViTw_WFagPVJ1lkkdmd3xLeIkv0IXHjqB0ESu9XCz6bsHIvVyUejhuVWlSrbGRPdebKrqTQ0nrNzDdpbPd2l3tPSbUh7d_L04Ily2L5_M5TwpmKKi21XSU4bMjtUqcfi3I2HA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: This is it. | Friend, This is it for today. I 'm going to be honest with you. Right now - I'm drawing a blank. I haven't scratched my head this much since Law School, and I feel like a dog chasing its tail because no matter what I do, nothing's working. Democrats have just about whipped the Red Wave back to where it started - and everything that we've built in this nation is in danger of being dismantled, scrapped, and forgotten. I 've tried and tried again to ensure that we've got everything we need to Take Back the Senate in November, but everything I've done has proven about as useful as a football bat. Our fundraising is plummeting. I'm getting phone calls from my staff hounding me to get back to work because they're saying that fundraising has halted entirely in the past few hours. Usually, I'd worry about more pressing matters on a Friday evening, but then I looked at the headlines and saw how much money the Democrats are raising. I had to heat up a pot of coffee and get to work. We WON'T WIN the Senate in November without your help! | I 've got to hit the phone and call in some favors, but I hope this message reaches you well. Best, A Tired & Worried John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Kamala Harris buries her head in the sand after this humiliating video of her was released
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | July 04, 2024

Kamala Harris buries
her head in the sand after this humiliating video of her was
released

The vice president continues to make a mockery of herself
and her office. Her ability to make embarrassing gaffes is
comparable to President Joe Biden's.

And Kamala Harris has buried her
head in the sand after this humiliating video of her was
released.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

MSNBC's Joy Reid has a
mental breakdown on camera that's shocked Americans

Reid is a radical
Leftist who is quick to prop up the Democrat's propaganda. But
now she's lost her mind in the process.
➞ Continue Reading

AOC caught up in
impeachment plans that have left Washington, D.C. stunned beyond
belief

Rep. Ocasio-Cortez is
known for making headlines. But she's constantly making them for
all the wrong reasons.
➞ Continue Reading

All hell broke loose in
Congress after this Rep. was charged with dangerous crime

Politicians want you
to think that they're always strict followers of the law. But
that's not always the case.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Kenosha County

The Republican Party of Kenosha County was very busy! They had a night out at Kingfish watching baseball, had Brad Schimel out at the monthly Pints and Politics, held a lawn/watch party for the debate, held a parade kick off with Eric Hovde and Congressman Steil, and watched the Kenosha Civic Veteran’s Parade.

Green County

The Green County Republican Party held a debate watch party on Thursday, June 27th, at their Victory Center in Monroe. They had a capacity crowd along with Channel 27 News from Madison attending the event.

Milwaukee County

The Republican Party of Milwaukee County held its kick off to Operation Connecting Milwaukee initiative in West Allis. Despite the rain, volunteers showed up and got out to hit the doors. Recently RPMC Chairman Hilario Deleon toured two local steel companies in greendale and got to meet workers who and hear directly from them about their thoughts and concerns for the State. Chairman Deleon remains committed to continuing efforts in outreach and relationship building throughout the County.

St. Croix County

The Republican Party of St. Croix County held their monthly executive board meeting on June 25. On June 27, they held the United We Stand Campaign Kickoff Rally with special guests: Rob Stafsholt, Senator 10th District, Rob Kreibich, Candidate 28th Assembly District, Brady Penfield, Candidate 28th Assembly District, Karl Anderson, District Attorney, Denise Anderson, County Treasurer, and Christina Hines, County Clerk. St. Croix Conty also played Biden Bingo hosted by Mike Grajeda of the Mike is Always Right Podcast. July 2 there was also a booth at the North Star Chiropractic Independence Day Block Party.

Waukesha County

The Republican Party of Waukesha County held a debate on June 19 for District Attorney with the two Republican candidates. There was a parade in Oconomowoc with Eric Hovde on June 29th and the Hartland Hometown Celebration Parade on June 30th.

Washburn County

The Republican Party of Washburn County hosted a Reagan Picnic with Guest Speakers: Congressman Tom Tiffany, State Senator Romaine Quinn, State Representative David Armstrong, and State Representative Chanz Green.

Washington County

The Republican Party of Washington County had a grand opening of the Germantown Victory Office. The new victory office also held a debate watch party on June 27.

Sauk County

The Republican Party of Sauk County had a great response on the bridge Right to Life Rally June 29.

Columbia County

The Republican Party of Columbia County had an Open House for their new office in Portage, Tuesday evening, June 25th. They had a great turnout with guest speakers: Haley Stuckmann-WISGOP Regional Director, Jerry Helmer-40th District Assembly candidate and Rebecca Witherspoon-42nd District Assembly candidate.

Upcoming Events: 7/4: St. Croix County Independence Day Flag Wave [] 7/4: Somers Parade [] 7/4: Sauk County Fourth of July Parade, Blackhawk 7/6: Hudson Booster Days Parade [] 7/6: Victory Center Open House [] 7/6: Monroe County Conservative Breakfast [] 7/6: Twin Lakes Liberty Fest Parade [] 7/8: Election Integrity Workshop [] 7/8: La Crosse County Membership Meeting [] 7/8: RPDC HQ Grand Opening, Sturgeon Bay [] 7/8: Dodge County Breakfast Gathering, Diner 67 Lomira 7/8: Kewaunee County Eric Hovde Live and In Person [] 7/9: Columbia County Voter Contact Training, Portage 7/10: Vilas County Pints & Politics [] 7/10-14: Northern WI State Fair Booth, Chippewa Falls 7/10: St. Croix County TRUMP FORCE 47 Training [] 7/11: Wood County Membership Meeting [] 7/11-14: Sauk County Fair 7/11: St. Croix Monthly Prayer Meeting [] 7/12: Election Integrity Workshop [] 7/12: River Falls Days Parade [] 7/13: Green County Annual Summer Picnic [] 7/14: Bristol Parade [] 7/14: New Richmond Fun Fest Parade [] 7/15: Election Integrity Workshop [] 7/18-21: RPSCC Booth at the St. Croix County Fair [] 7/22: Kenosha County Members Meeting 7/24: Kenosha County Sail Aboard the Red Witch II [] 7/30: Kenosha County Parade Kick-Off [] 8/5: Chippewa County Corn Roast Picnic, Irvine Park, Chippewa Falls 8/13-15: Chippewa County Farm Tech Days Booth, Cadott 8/14-18: Kenosha County Fair 8/24: Kenosha County 2nd Annual Garage Sale [] 8/28: Outagamie County Annual Corn Roast [] 9/20: Outagamie County Constitution Day Dinner [] 9/28: Outagamie County Booth at Appleton's Octoberfest [] Kenosha County The Republican Party of Kenosha County was very busy! They had a night out at Kingfish watching baseball, had Brad Schimel out at the monthly Pints and Politics, held a lawn/watch party for the debate, held a parade kick off with Eric Hovde and Congressman Steil, and watched the Kenosha Civic Veteran’s Parade. Green County The Green County Republican Party held a debate watch party on Thursday, June 27th, at their Victory Center in Monroe. They had a capacity crowd along with Channel 27 News from Madison attending the event. Milwaukee County The Republican Party of Milwaukee County held its kick off to Operation Connecting Milwaukee initiative in West Allis. Despite the rain, volunteers showed up and got out to hit the doors. Recently RPMC Chairman Hilario Deleon toured two local steel companies in greendale and got to meet workers who and hear directly from them about their thoughts and concerns for the State. Chairman Deleon remains committed to continuing efforts in outreach and relationship building throughout the County. St. Croix County The Republican Party of St. Croix County held their monthly executive board meeting on June 25. On June 27, they held the United We Stand Campaign Kickoff Rally with special guests: Rob Stafsholt, Senator 10th District, Rob Kreibich, Candidate 28th Assembly District, Brady Penfield, Candidate 28th Assembly District, Karl Anderson, District Attorney, Denise Anderson, County Treasurer, and Christina Hines, County Clerk. St. Croix Conty also played Biden Bingo hosted by Mike Grajeda of the Mike is Always Right Podcast. July 2 there was also a booth at the North Star Chiropractic Independence Day Block Party. Waukesha County The Republican Party of Waukesha County held a debate on June 19 for District Attorney with the two Republican candidates. There was a parade in Oconomowoc with Eric Hovde on June 29th and the Hartland Hometown Celebration Parade on June 30th. Washburn County The Republican Party of Washburn County hosted a Reagan Picnic with Guest Speakers: Congressman Tom Tiffany, State Senator Romaine Quinn, State Representative David Armstrong, and State Representative Chanz Green. Washington County The Republican Party of Washington County had a grand opening of the Germantown Victory Office. The new victory office also held a debate watch party on June 27. Sauk County The Republican Party of Sauk County had a great response on the bridge Right to Life Rally June 29. Columbia County The Republican Party of Columbia County had an Open House for their new office in Portage, Tuesday evening, June 25th. They had a great turnout with guest speakers: Haley Stuckmann-WISGOP Regional Director, Jerry Helmer-40th District Assembly candidate and Rebecca Witherspoon-42nd District Assembly candidate. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Patriotism – why it matters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/educationstandards-11572768?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**I teamed up with PragerU to make their July 4 th video about the importance of patriotism. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=91cce0a943&e=5703353baa)
---
| I might have only been in America for a few years, but I love this country and I want you to know why.

**Have a wonderful Independence Day today!**

If you care about the things I discuss in my Prager video, and you want to ensure your children and grandchildren share your love of America, you might like to get them this teaching tool kit I have produced, _What Makes America Special._
---
| |
---
Each order comes with a:
* FREE 22 page CHILDREN’S ACTIVITY BOOK (downloadable)
* FREE US FLAG

---
| [ORDER HERE!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ce74b796ff&e=5703353baa "ORDER HERE!")
---
| **Have a beautiful July 4 th day of celebration, from my family to yours! **
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: STEVE SCALISE
subject: upfront and honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If you'll indulge me, I'd like to go into more detail now:

| |

---
| | | I want to be upfront and honest about this:

We just missed the single most important fundraising goal of the Election Year. I should have explained the stakes of our Mid-Year deadline better, _**[but if you'll indulge me, I'd like to go into more detail now:](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dd942ac55d04115b4ac98e839d231b4&_e=ebV6UIbD8-yMdGBZm49Hxxwzy986GfJ4stJhMsYkQHEGMohNoh0HHkPKylNR2lifhvV1Lmke81g4QxQ5gPAdv4LGVdbdSh0WYbbnXrj_153w5njUJe3lRZpYu57t1nmZnfCDW23jtCUBQkrzV1mZc9yu-o62th3sTVT_1tNXBwAg7AaM2wGlhk2SiruDmMbSAcEZdrB6osbzLWi89J7lKpRJ-ZGOZ_Shll2UESfvNJc4IiqGmix9ur_a0gqu6Hn4cOfTVbrCdImQSy3UbRzCXLXRk_WjCDofrGpLWU8yjb43nvAQ1cv2UQ3xkEWAU26EfRDNm2kbG-qnRdxmCytOW_J4GvZgxPSTadTkAtiafK2HCInKSqDqCC0fFU2IY5jY8L3D2M9EUDLzwkt0yB_XMYoQDB9hZmfQnCfc_hspFihaugyKFxhKQ-YCkBaxNbP9IIpB-VcUakwSFBqIAZF_ow%3D%3D "but if you’ll indulge me, I’d like to go into more detail now:")**_
- This was our FIRST deadline since Trump was convicted in a rigged court - This was our FIRST deadline since the presidential debate - This was our LAST deadline before the Republican National Convention - This was our LAST deadline before Trump's sham sentencing
These are all election-defining moments and we failed to reach our fundraising goal at the worst possible time. **And if this email doesn 't work, I'm afraid we'll be forced to pull our ads off the airwaves, slash our voter contact budgets, and cut back critical get-out-the-vote initiatives.**

_So consider this message a Hail Mary._

I set a goal of raising 250,000 dollars between now and the 4th of July. It's a lofty goal but that's the BARE MINIMUM we'd need to fully fund all our campaign operations.

_After missing our deadline, this is truly a make-or-break moment for Conservatives._

The last thing I wanted was to come to you with an urgent message - especially after everyone came out of the woodwork to ask you for money at the end of the month...

_**[But when the fate of our country hangs in the balance, I'm not leaving anything to chance. I'm here to win. I'm here to save our Conservative House Majority, win a supermajority in the Senate, and reelect President Trump.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dd942ac55d04115b4ac98e839d231b4&_e=ebV6UIbD8-yMdGBZm49Hxxwzy986GfJ4stJhMsYkQHEGMohNoh0HHkPKylNR2lifhvV1Lmke81g4QxQ5gPAdv4LGVdbdSh0WYbbnXrj_153w5njUJe3lRZpYu57t1nmZnfCDW23jtCUBQkrzV1mZc9yu-o62th3sTVT_1tNXBwAg7AaM2wGlhk2SiruDmMbSAcEZdrB6osbzLWi89J7lKpRJ-ZGOZ_Shll2UESfvNJc4IiqGmix9ur_a0gqu6Hn4cOfTVbrCdImQSy3UbRzCXLXRk_WjCDofrGpLWU8yjb43nvAQ1cv2UQ3xkEWAU26EfdCna-Q9XlcFIEcZ1v6lTOz2UiCKpAXS2UrK2--sFJQg4VRu3bX6Nj3G3LBHtnaqItMc0LYuec1v62H3GxZfjdL3_yh39H2K4tbAG7CoxKVhwy2I0ggGuSTIs2SrsahS6bWSKFMbc2xxLavKj0eHQg%3D%3D "But when the fate of our country hangs in the balance, I’m not leaving anything to chance. I’m here to win. I’m here to save our Conservative House Majority, win a supermajority in the Senate, and reelect President Trump.")**_

If that means sending one last fundraising email, I'll do what I must.

So with all that being said, here's my final pitch to you:

**This quarter was important before ... but after Trump's sham conviction and the presidential debate - and just days before our Convention AND Trump's sentencing - this is officially our most important deadline yet.**

There's still time to right this ship so I'm humbly asking you to donate before July 4th.
---
| | | [ PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dd942ac55d04115b4ac98e839d231b4&_e=ebV6UIbD8-yMdGBZm49Hxxwzy986GfJ4stJhMsYkQHEGMohNoh0HHkPKylNR2lifhvV1Lmke81g4QxQ5gPAdv4LGVdbdSh0WYbbnXrj_153w5njUJe3lRZpYu57t1nmZnfCDW23jtCUBQkrzV1mZc9yu-o62th3sTVT_1tNXBwAg7AaM2wGlhk2SiruDmMbSAcEZdrB6osbzLWi89J7lKpRJ-ZGOZ_Shll2UESfvNJc4IiqGmix9ur_a0gqu6Hn4cOfTVbrCdImQSy3UbRzCXLXRk_WjCDofrGpLWU8yjb43nvAQ1cv2UQ3xkEWAU26EikejARrWxfLD_RK2CBRS5jt6OLLLe2br_Om-eNe_HI1-BmATySa5MxShCXvY9wPMqXQq09WLz5_y68TnI1wmBZ2NxWMqIQJAMMLRjHK-WBYNXSQqtRjZ8knJ_Htr4mMjUu9fANdhLD51JujvsuLdCQ%3D%3D " PLEASE DONATE NOW")

Thanks for all you do,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

I'm launching my brand new _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dd942ac55d04115b4ac98e839d231b4&_e=ebV6UIbD8-yMdGBZm49Hxxwzy986GfJ4stJhMsYkQHEa2nMpN7Wfbon_yX08umPjf5FH13Pukv3ZeDRjLt9YAhpZHPFI4WCzrEQHclbQpm-cl7AbjXt_gEo6tw5UHANNwoDafcAAam8yfhvT_kmPG2IcMiIHJfqytDNvXwv9PvhXw9eIY3wED9fvxqOo5kXrIV8kFYFdlFkRxf6ebjooL-d3Gv9WSfaytBArLv-lmDVyMBmdo-6MSykoyj8utI_ce99Q3DcIQ6XZl4lZ5rholde6FusrZat7cZd2nltyY7uqGe2q9bzEdPec9SH6K_DTlv97JEWlDWfdjxT8drYqzrg-U4eD-3QYTo-VlYDarqF5azesr_TYnW8ln0WNus_Q0p5_-NT4eE-GdyaqLJQJSL1a5PElKU5b4Z0AQpidAjAU6Acw78xygRjaUWCJG4kvGlhsaXTLu8s1-jNfyYWF3Q%3D%3D "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

| | | [START YOUR CHECK-IN >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dd942ac55d04115b4ac98e839d231b4&_e=ebV6UIbD8-yMdGBZm49Hxxwzy986GfJ4stJhMsYkQHEa2nMpN7Wfbon_yX08umPjf5FH13Pukv3ZeDRjLt9YAhpZHPFI4WCzrEQHclbQpm-cl7AbjXt_gEo6tw5UHANNwoDafcAAam8yfhvT_kmPG2IcMiIHJfqytDNvXwv9PvhXw9eIY3wED9fvxqOo5kXrIV8kFYFdlFkRxf6ebjooL-d3Gv9WSfaytBArLv-lmDVyMBmdo-6MSykoyj8utI_ce99Q3DcIQ6XZl4lZ5rholde6FusrZat7cZd2nltyY7uqGe2q9bzEdPec9SH6K_DTVIGtAw6NOF6bkSnBaqvOSv4cDFClKGox4wEcWzyaZHIgm-khRafx17oe6wHY2AeK1AbmncwcsFHoTj9OwZIa5aKAutopB74u_N-Zon1QnDtCB9kaMruWAjUli6dlxjcvU95hI1QVb73Lvv0xN9qfXg%3D%3D "START YOUR CHECK-IN ")

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Claim your free chapter now for a limited time
body:
The family's pivotal role in our society is under threat

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Happy Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
A Day to Celebrate our Freedoms
| | | |
---
| Dear Derek,
As we gather to celebrate Independence Day, we reflect on the freedoms and values that define our great nation. This day commemorates the courage, resilience, and vision of our founding fathers who declared our independence 248 years ago. It is a reminder of the enduring principles of liberty, justice, and republicanism that continue to guide us.
Today, we honor the sacrifices of those who have fought and continue to fight to preserve our freedom. Let us remember the brave men and women of our armed forces, veterans, and their families, whose dedication ensures our safety and sovereignty. Their service embodies the spirit of Independence Day, and we owe them our deepest gratitude.
As we celebrate with fireworks, parades, and family gatherings, let's also take a moment to reflect on how we can contribute to the betterment of our community and nation. Whether through volunteer work, civic engagement, or simply being a good neighbor, each of us has a role in strengthening the fabric of our society.
On a personal note, this Independence Day is particularly special for me. I am excited to share that I will be marrying the love of my life, Melissa, this Saturday. As we embark on this new chapter together, I am filled with joy and gratitude for the love and support we have received from our families, friends, and community. Melissa and I look forward to building our future together in New Hampshire, a state we are proud to call home.
May this Independence Day be filled with joy, laughter, and cherished moments with loved ones. Let us celebrate the freedoms we enjoy and commit to working together to ensure a bright and prosperous future for all.
**Happy Independence Day, New Hampshire!**
Best,
Joe
Rep. Joe Sweeney Chairman & Founder, Granite Solutions
---
Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org

body:
I know the past few days have been tough. I'm sure you're getting a lot of questions. I'm sure many of you have questions as well. | | |
---
Peter, I know the past few days have been tough. I'm sure you're getting a lot of questions. I'm sure many of you have questions as well. **So, let me say this as clearly and simply as I can: I'm running.** I'm the Democratic Party’s nominee. No one is pushing me out. I'm not leaving, I'm in this race to the end, _and WE are going to win this election._ [If that’s all you need to hear, pitch in a few bucks to help Kamala and me defeat Donald Trump in November. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZAHBYtwOYq1P-51xWiyivVReMFTOLEW2nxxLbAprslar-tP2MzNMNv5ixQBlV1yACy62VEBfqC8sx01pEjaY9_szX5mVlWKgepi4ichWM0zxQ8YD1PgURARk7QjBLrf2r1OC4iiW5ThSpSbsol_okata4aZYo8gm7-Nd5EErsHsijzBgaN8xJhyze8dbTGl2iA4V3n9VFgZYUqiS5dKF6FJDKz_JbZICNGbqyl3tF6U72YnjKDpuXxp2XzVS6BDriS4T60tJJSJPWzFtc_sRjt5HzyPP-2ORqL03P52iTUEOo-c6GuozgxzonD6UW6lP-hcIOuRN4zaWYePgCEJEJWnenz-QGeRBkWqcnsOgbM0N_HmTCUaSUPdQIJb1s_O-ExJWHM9_AeA7rOHbCK_eMMe5qJqfluNBSvV9kK4_e-0E5OE8LKGe2QKekxp3X4a5bhVwDp_54iiVpcbUSaOoAdQ/47r/56LVP_8fRs6OpFEQ370lSQ/h0/h001.Dq1nNuvqOqsXHrPFTzO0QCar_cF3Cs-svPHGRqjmHhE) If not, please keep reading. I've been knocked down and counted out my whole life. I'm sure the same is true for many of you. But my father had an expression. He said, “Champ, it’s not how many times you get knocked down. _It’s how quickly you get up._ ” As a country, when we get knocked down, we get back up. When we get counted out, we just work harder. That is exactly what I am going to do, and it’s what I need you to do as well. **Just as we beat Donald Trump in 2020, we are going to beat him again in 2024. But it won’t be easy, and I need YOU behind me to get it done. Each and every one of you.** This campaign is bigger than me or you. Everything we believe in, everything we stand for, and everyone we are fighting for are at risk in this election. [It’s in large part because of the support from folks like you that I know we will win in November. So, will you stand with me and chip in a $25 donation today?
