name: =?utf-8?q?a_personal_note_=F0=9F=92=8C__=28via_VPP=29?=
subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks! >>
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71390?t=6&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71390?t=7&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71390?t=8&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last three years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71390?t=9&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71390?t=10&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=15464%2E878179%2Ew7pDWk)

subject: This July 4th double down on democracy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvkP_qkVIdE665h6yyoYaT94bUOOIQgnkwo900aHwFGEQhi39tiL4D1mF1SBSKQuSp12SNqeb4kHBvUia2mkPBkvHLu00FW3vC3aq9di7fNFy1D-yqTN-yPdogzLSyVkwvrtR2BCS5_Ax1Ua8GVZms3EsFh38quS1mazKS33Qn9IwtUH6jsY-Ue9RB1HvHbnye4O-COlmVWuwY5iO4mcsDsJl9E76vJrO67fix8FQc9Qp9xhCuMDE2FKRp0oduPChIDtd7sxwyYIQpyacimeJXjAV5nNRRT8b7hBGbGuD-POU9czU1foX_sOgWIeJYsn66IFnwwVTtwvLfGCj7T2W6UuE-XtcYCNVgB-8a6eunvDjU69ZB6K_3MBgLPrmWKgV4/47r/C8-leZXLTLClN1cnHOkuag/h0/h001.B3mYAhMxb4VQ1AVxIlXOjA44lxwHHMgG5OyFDmZZMqM)
** On July 4, 1776, the Continental Congress adopted the Declaration of Independence, proclaiming the sovereignty of the United States and our independence from King George III. This week, in the ultimate act of Constitutional betrayal, our MAGA Supreme Court granted the US President absolute immunity from criminal prosecution for crimes committed as part of his official acts, _essentially declaring that the president is now king and above the law._ **This ruling morphs the presidency into a monarch-like figure, armored against accountability and beyond the reach of judicial scrutiny.** [**Calling all democracy defenders to FIGHT BACK! name: Team Kennedy
subject: This is OUR Election to Win Now!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
51% of Americans now identify as Independents.

|
---
| | | [51% of Americans now identify as Independents.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=51_percent_7_4_24_nd1&n=1)

|
---
Dear Peter,
Think about this for a moment—51% of Americans now identify as Independents, forming what could be the largest political group in the country, surpassing both Democrats and Republicans combined.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. isn't just participating in the race; he's leading America's largest de facto political faction.
This isn't just another election; it's our election to win!
[Help Bobby Win](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=51_percent_7_4_24_nd1&n=3)
We are on the brink of a pivotal shift in American politics, one that could reshape our nation's future and propel us toward an unprecedented victory.
Our campaign is gaining momentum every day, driven by a groundswell of support from people like you who are ready for a change. To keep this momentum alive, we need your help.
Your contribution today is more than a donation; it's an investment in a historic movement. It will fund essential campaign activities, from outreach efforts to securing vital resources, ensuring that we seize this unparalleled opportunity.

name: Diane Sare
subject: Symposium--The American Revolution: "Destined to Cover the Surface of the Globe"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240705_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend -- The American Declaration of Independence and subsequent victorious American Revolution was no local matter. Like-minded patriots worldwide were keenly focused on the attempt to create a completely revolutionary, oligarch-free form of government based on the idea of "consent of the governed." As John Quincy Adams wrote in his July, 4th 1821 speech, it was "the corner stone of a new fabric, destined to cover the surface of the globe. It demolished at a stroke the lawfulness of all governments founded upon conquest. It swept away all the rubbish of accumulated centuries of servitude. It announced in practical form to the world the transcendent truth of the unalienable sovereignty of the people." Let us restore that great international mission, once so clearly understood and embraced by past patriots of our nation but so forgotten today.
### [New York Symposium, July 5, 2024, 8:00 PM: 'The American Revolution: "Destined to Cover the Surface of the Globe"'](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=2PNlHEbVYFsh-F_FzIY8nSM9dZXF86qxXYrMDRBQ8aI&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240705_symposium&n=2)

name: Treasurer Read
subject: Happy 4th of July!
body:
www.tobiasread.com [www.tobiasread.com]
Dear Peter,
Happy Independence Day!
Today, my family joined our campaign team and volunteers to walk in the 4th of July parade put on by the Hillsboro Rotary Club. We walked with the Washington County Democrats, and it was heartening to see people cheer louder when they saw us coming!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7379437A6E6B65464B2F6539394D66376F53365255706C666E5A6931735674323855684A48612F77374A5365396779576947756A2F546D373377784F2B635130/editor_images/IMG_0310-min.jpg]
I’m excited to be a candidate for Secretary of State. Today more than ever, I’m struck by just how critical protecting the right to vote (for everyone!) is to our republic. There’s just nothing more important in a democracy. But even as most of us celebrate the beginning of our country, there are some who want to make it harder to vote–and even to get rid of voting by mail! As your Secretary of State, I’ll protect the right of every Oregonian to vote.
Together, we can ensure that every Oregonian has a voice in our democracy. Our campaign is powered by people like you who believe in a fair and accessible voting system. Thank you for your support and commitment to protecting our voting rights.
Let’s make sure every vote counts.
Join us in this fight for our democracy.
Donate here today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/readforsecretaryofstate]
I hope your holiday is filled with family, friends, and a moment to consider how lucky we are to live in this country that we continue to work to improve. Have fun and be safe!
Thank you,
Tobias Read
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77260/images/TR%20signature.png]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=n1ntHg%2FmX%2BxWYRy3oQmuW7vlp8R6TrWvVI64lnLX7X6%2F%2BimsGQd0elN3pK0oASKj1NrCh%2Bq2hIZIimdE0hNbIsDQY2QBrlYm9N8kRU5s5qyee59Y%2FWDbSZYrxiU07JFB%2BToIAn1hHHdZn%2FqohOz%2FS5qZF9QplySkONXlv6mounb%2B8OFJY%2F%2B9ZioO6FOmkUhWsfbdVeO9Ku4nqWnuYovq44%2BIXfXGIADKjmJ7sX%2FF4IeYkzslVD5%2BnWXwIVf%2BBvLjZe23Y%2FIvRfVmA298dliA4YCsJskfwL%2BO9G2CacVCqCPO15YK71ahiht1v%2FoHwbGVCKd5c5l%2BnF966ULJS9qF2mt6S3oKsNTSBw7AX28RmBjD%2F3Ei%2BBi5nR0LHnLL2wN4ky%2FrM%2FmrZPNIZhq%2FJGhT%2BSIjy7UQ3fHzqSVTZeFqD7kNDaeTS8YVBjvgUx8mLxDd .

Patriot,As we gather with family and friends to celebrate Independence Day, we reflect on the enduring values that define our great nation. body:
Friend, I'm fighting back — but I can't do it alone
| | |
---
**Friend, have you seen Rick Scott’s latest attacks against me?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88253977/483626433/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1470-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEzNmM0MDktNWUzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_cWX7QgMzM6eZH2kZR2Z8olv0Qp4F2kdZsDzvHteW4=)
He’s spending SIX FIGURES of his own fortune to run Spanish-language ads on the _Copa América_ broadcast — the world's oldest continental soccer tournament — to directly ATTACK me. He thinks he can out-run me with my community.
**Not on my watch, friend. **
My team and I are fighting back with ads of our own —**but unlike my ultra-wealthy opponent, I can’t keep them live without a massive surge of grassroots support to reach my $100,000 end-of-day goal. _[Can I count on you to chip in $5 right now to help me fight back against Rick Scott's attacks on the airwaves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88253978/483626434/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1470-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEzNmM0MDktNWUzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_cWX7QgMzM6eZH2kZR2Z8olv0Qp4F2kdZsDzvHteW4=)_**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88253979/483626435/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1470-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEzNmM0MDktNWUzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_cWX7QgMzM6eZH2kZR2Z8olv0Qp4F2kdZsDzvHteW4=)

**LOOK:** Rick Scott is desperate to be the next leader of the Senate GOP. And since this race will decide Senate control, he's not leaving _anything_ to chance.
He's proven time and again that he cares only about helping ultra-wealthy oligarchs like himself, having written the plan to **END Social Security and Medicare** and **RAISE taxes** on middle class families.
He even voted for a **nationwide BAN on abortions **.._. even though a majority of Florida voters support keeping abortion legal._
And he knows his positions are fundamentally unpopular in Florida —** it's why he spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat in 2018, and why he's gearing up to spend even more to defeat me and buy it again in November.**
But frankly, friend, I've had enough. _ Ya no más. _
I’m running to retire Rick Scott and give the Sunshine State a Senator who _actually_ cares about fighting for Florida's working families — _and not skipping votes to act as Donald Trump's criminal courtroom puppet_.
**But to withstand Scott's deluge of nasty attacks and stay competitive against his self-funded campaign war chest, I can't afford to fall short of today's urgent $100,000 goal.**
_[**So friend, before my 11:59 p.m. deadline, will you please rush $5, $25, or anything you can spare right away to get my ads live, fight back against Scott's self-funded smear campaign, and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/88253980/483626436/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1470-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEzNmM0MDktNWUzYS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_cWX7QgMzM6eZH2kZR2Z8olv0Qp4F2kdZsDzvHteW4=)_

clean_body: Friend, I'm fighting back — but I can't do it alone | | | Friend, have you seen Rick Scott’s latest attacks against me? = He’s spending SIX FIGURES of his own fortune to run Spanish-language ads on the Copa América broadcast — the world's oldest continental soccer tournament — to directly ATTACK me. He thinks he can out-run me with my community. Not on my watch, friend. My team and I are fighting back with ads of our own —but unlike my ultra-wealthy opponent, I can’t keep them live without a massive surge of grassroots support to reach my $100,000 end-of-day goal. = | | = LOOK: Rick Scott is desperate to be the next leader of the Senate GOP. And since this race will decide Senate control, he's not leaving anything to chance. He's proven time and again that he cares only about helping ultra-wealthy oligarchs like himself, having written the plan to END Social Security and Medicare and RAISE taxes on middle class families. He even voted for a nationwide BAN on abortions ... even though a majority of Florida voters support keeping abortion legal. And he knows his positions are fundamentally unpopular in Florida — it's why he spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat in 2018, and why he's gearing up to spend even more to defeat me and buy it again in November. But frankly, friend, I've had enough. Ya no más. I’m running to retire Rick Scott and give the Sunshine State a Senator who actually cares about fighting for Florida's working families — and not skipping votes to act as Donald Trump's criminal courtroom puppet. But to withstand Scott's deluge of nasty attacks and stay competitive against his self-funded campaign war chest, I can't afford to fall short of today's urgent $100,000 goal. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for everything you do, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
